You can see other Survivors' scratch marks.

When the Killer causes another Survivor to lose a health state, the Killer's aura is revealed to you for 6/8/10 seconds.

perks.name: Residual Manifest
perks.description:
A lifetime of chasing the darkness has taught you that the best disinfectant is light.

After a successful Killer Blind action, the Killer is affected by the Blindness status effect for 20/25/30 seconds.

This perk grants the ability to rummage through an opened chest once per trial and will guarantee a basic Flashlight.

Blindness prevents the Killer from seeing auras.

perks.name: Overzealous
perks.description:
Fighting back against the Ravage motivates and inspires you.

After cleansing or blessing a Totem, this perk activates.

Your generator repair speed is increased by 8/9/10%. This bonus is doubled if you cleanse or bless a Hex totem.

This perk deactivates when you lose a health state by any means.

perks.name: Wiretap
perks.description:
You know that the best way to stay one step ahead is to keep tabs on the competition. Wiretap activates after completing a total of 40% worth of repair progress on generators. When standing next to a generator, press the Active Ability button 2 to install a Wiretap, which stays active for 100/110/120 seconds. Affected generators will be revealed to all Survivors by a yellow aura. Only one Wiretap can be active on a generator. - When the Killer enters within 14 meters of the generator, their aura is revealed to all Survivors.
    - Wiretap deactivates when the generator is damaged by the Killer or when the timer expires.

perks.name: Reactive Healing
perks.description:
The more the situation becomes compromised, the more determined you become to complete the operation.

When another Survivor loses a health state in a 32-meter radius around you while you are injured, instantly increase your healing progression by 40/45/50% of the missing healing progression.

perks.name: Low Profile
perks.description:
You work best alone. When it’s just you and your pursuer, you know how to disappear.

When you become the last Survivor standing, this perk activates. Hide your scratch marks, pools of blood and grunts of pain caused by injuries for 70/80/90 seconds.

perks.name: Better Than New
perks.description:
You are an expert in combat medicine. Patients leave your care reinvigorated.

Upon completing a healing action on another Survivor, the targeted Survivor gets a 12/14/16% speed boost to healing, opening chests, cleansing and blessing Totems.

Survivors keep the bonus until they lose a health state.

perks.name: Reassurance
perks.description:
Your presence helps allies focus, assuaging the panic associated with extreme conditions.

When within a 6-meter radius around a hooked Survivor, use the Active Ability Button 2 to pause their struggle progression for 20/25/30 seconds.

If they are on the struggle phase, it also pauses the Struggle Skill Checks.

Reassurance can only be triggered once per survivor per hook instance.

perks.name: Hyperfocus
perks.description:
You throw yourself entirely into your tasks and find ways to be more efficient than anyone else.

After hitting a great Skill Check while repairing or healing, this perk gains 1 token, up to 6 tokens. Each token increases the chance of Skill Check trigger by 4%, the Skill Check cursor speed by 4% and the bonus progression for great Skill Checks by 10/20/30% of its base value.

The perk loses all tokens in case of normal Skill Check successes, Skill Check fails, or if the action is stopped by any means.

perks.name: Potential Energy
perks.description:
Your arcane abilities have adapted to The Entity's Realm after centuries of wandering, granting you unprecedented control over its many devices.

While repairing, press the Active Ability Button 2 to gain tokens instead of repairing the generator, up to a maximum of 10/15/20 tokens.

While you have at least 1 token, press the Active Ability Button 2 to consume all tokens and repair the generator for 1% per token spent.

When you lose a health state, all tokens are lost.

perks.name: Fogwise
perks.description:
In your countless years in the fog, you've seen it all, and when you're focused, you can remember most of it, too.

Hitting a great Skill Check while repairing a generator reveals the Killer's aura to you for 4/5/6 seconds.

perks.name: Quick Gambit
perks.description:
When you have a Killer's attention, you know how to keep it; others can be confident they won't be interrupted any time soon.

When you are chased by the Killer, see the aura of other Survivors. Any Survivor repairing a generator gains a 3/4/5% repair speed bonus.

This perk goes on cooldown for 40 seconds when you lose a health state.

perks.name: Cut Loose
perks.description:
You get in enough trouble. You know how to get out of it.

After performing a rushed vault in a chase, this perk activates.

While this perk is active, your rushed vaults are silent for up to 4/5/6 seconds and successfully performing a rushed vault during that time resets the timer.

This perk goes on cooldown for 45 seconds.

perks.name: Friendly Competition
perks.description:
You revel in the community spirit of a competition, and inspire others to follow suit.

Whenever you finish repairing a generator with at least one other Survivor, this perk activates.

You and other survivors who finished repairing the generator with you get 5% increased repair progress speed for 100/110/120 seconds.

Survivors can only have one instance of this perk's ability active at once.

perks.name: Teamwork: Power of Two
perks.description:
It’s hard to keep up with you, but it doesn’t stop people from trying.

When you finish healing another Survivor, you both gain 5% Haste as long as you stay within 8/12/16 meters of each other.

This effect lingers for 4 seconds when leaving the range.

This effect does not stack.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Background Player
perks.description:
You're not usually the center of attention. In some cases, this can be a good thing.

When the Killer picks up another Survivor, Background Player activates for 10 seconds.

When you start running, you gain 50% Haste for 5 seconds.

This perk cannot be used while Exhausted.

This perk causes the Exhausted status effect for 30/25/20 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Blood Rush
perks.description:
Your mind and body are honed for great feats, allowing you to push through with extra effort when necessary.

After being unhooked, Blood Rush activates for the next 40/50/60 seconds.

While suffering from the Exhausted status effect, press the Active Ability Button 1 to recover from Exhausted instantly.

This perk deactivates when it is used or when performing a Conspicuous Action.

Blood Rush is disabled once the Exit Gates are powered.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

perks.name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth
perks.description:
When someone helps you out, you respond in kind.

When another Survivor finishes healing you, you both leave no scratch marks as long as you stay within 8/12/16 meters of each other.

This effect lingers for 4 seconds when leaving the range.

This effect does not stack.

perks.name: Troubleshooter
perks.description:
No amount of distraction will shake you from your primary task.

When you are chased by the Killer, Troubleshooter activates.

- You see the aura of the Generator with the most progress.
- You see the aura of the Killer for 4/5/6 seconds after dropping a Pallet.

The effect lasts for 6/8/10 seconds after being in chase, then deactivates.

perks.name: Made for This
perks.description:
You were born to survive, and raised to adapt.

Made for This activates while you are in the injured state.

- After you finish healing another Survivor, gain the Endurance status effect for 6/8/10 seconds.
- While affected by Deep Wound, you have 3% Haste.

Endurance prevents a Survivor from being downed, inflicting Deep Wound instead.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Scavenger
perks.description:
Where others see junk, you see valuable improvised tools.

While you are holding an empty toolbox, Scavenger activates.

Succeeding a great skill check while repairing gains 1 token, up to 5.

When you reach maximum tokens, lose all tokens and automatically recharge your toolbox to full. Then, your generator repair speed is 50% slower for 40/35/30 seconds.

This perk grants the ability to rummage through an opened chest once per Trial and will guarantee a basic Toolbox.

perks.name: Dramaturgy
perks.description:
When people bring you on to their project, they do so because of the unexpected magic you bring to your performance. Dramaturgy activates while you are healthy. While running, press the active ability button 2 to run with knees high for 0.5 seconds and then gain 25% Haste for 2 seconds, followed by an unknown effect.
    - Become Exposed for 12 seconds; - Gain 25% Haste for 2 seconds; - Scream, but nothing happens; - Gain a random rare item, with random add-ons, and drop any held item.
The same effect cannot happen twice in a row. Dramaturgy causes Exhausted for 60/50/40 seconds. Can't be used while Exhausted. Exposed Survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured. Haste increases Survivor movement speed. Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating other perks that cause Exhausted.

perks.name: Scene Partner
perks.description:
You lock in with your co-star, engaging with and reacting to each other on a higher level.

Scene Partner activates when you are in the Killer's Terror Radius.

Whenever you look at the Killer, scream, then see the Killer's aura for 4/5/6 seconds.

There is a chance you will scream again, if you do, you will see the Killer's aura for an additional 2 seconds.

Scene Partner then goes on cooldown for 40 seconds.

perks.name: Plot Twist
perks.description:
Big moments are vital, but you know that sometimes an understated read can be just as powerful.

Plot Twist activates when you are injured.

Press the ability button 2 while crouched and motionless to enter the dying state silently.

When using Plot Twist to enter the dying state: you leave no blood pools and you make no noise and you can fully recover from the dying state at 25% increased speed.

When you recover by yourself using Plot Twist, you are healed instantly and you gain 50% Haste for 2/3/4 seconds.

This perk deactivates if you recover by yourself by any means.

This perk re-activates when the exit gates are powered.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Lucky Star
perks.description:
You know how to stay calm in the face of incomprehensible danger.

When you hide in a locker, you make no grunts of pain.

After exiting the locker, you see the aura of the closest generator and all Survivors, leave no pools of blood and make no grunts of pain for 30 seconds.

This perk goes on cooldown for 35/30/25 seconds.

perks.name: Chemical Trap
perks.description:
In the Fog, an officer must adapt to the materials at hand.

Chemical Trap activates after completing a total of 20% worth of progress on generators.

While standing next to a dropped pallet, press the Active Ability Button 2 to install a Trap, which stays active for 40/50/60 seconds.

Affected pallets will be revealed to all Survivors by a yellow aura. Only one Chemical Trap can be active on a pallet.

When the Killer performs the break action on the pallet, the Chemical Trap explodes, and they gain 50% Hindered for 4 seconds.

Hindered reduces Killer movement speed.

“How do we kill it, Ash?” –Ellen Ripley

perks.name: Light-footed
perks.description:
Crossing paths with deadly killers has taught you the value of discretion.

When you are healthy, this perk activates.

Your running footsteps are silent.

This perk goes on cooldown for 14/12/10 seconds after performing a rushed action.

“Come on, cat.” –Ellen Ripley

perks.name: Champion of Light
perks.description:
The glow of the flashlight looks a little different, feels a little warmer.

When you are shining a Flashlight, you gain 50% Haste.

When you successfully blind the Killer, they also gain 20% Hindered for 6 seconds.

Then, this perk goes on cooldown for 60/50/40 seconds.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

Hindered reduces Killer movement speed.

“I squeezed the flashlight like my life depended on it, willing it to stop coming any closer.” – Departure

perks.name: Boon: Illumination
perks.description:
Your keen insight is something best shared with others.

Press and hold the Ability Button 1 near a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Soft chimes ring out in a 24 meter range.

Survivors inside your Boon Totem’s range see the aura of all chests and all generators in blue.

If you have a lit Boon Totem, you cleanse or bless Totems 6/8/10% faster.

You can only bless one Totem at a time. All equipped Boon perks are active on your Boon Totem.

"A shift in reality. Heavy with hidden meanings" – Return

perks.name: Deadline
perks.description:
Desperation creeps in, and you push yourself to work harder.

This perk activates when you are injured.

Skill Checks appear 6/8/10% more frequently when repairing or healing and appear in random places.

The penalty for missing skill checks is reduced by 50%.

“The night had been one desperate situation after another.” – Departure

perks.name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders
perks.description:
The place where fear festers and terror treads is also where those with the gift can reach across the veil.

When in the basement near the circle, press the Ability Button 1 to begin the Invocation.

Invocations take 60 seconds. Other Survivors will see your aura during this and can join an ongoing interaction.

Once the Invocation is completed:

- You become Injured and gain the Broken status effect for the rest of the trial.
- Reduce the maximum required generator charges of all remaining generators by 8/9/10.

Completing the Invocation disables that perk for all Survivors.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

"I call upon the spirits of the night, to aid us in our desperate flight!" - Sable

perks.name: Strength in Shadows
perks.description:
A chance for renewed power down where danger calls home.

When in the basement, this perk activates.

Unlocks the Strength in Shadows ability, which allows you to heal without a Med-kit at 70% normal healing speed.

When you finish a heal in the basement, you see the Killer's aura for 6/8/10 seconds.

"I’m getting out of here, if it’s the last thing I do.” - Sable

perks.name: Wicked
perks.description:
They can try to hurt you. But you’re not going down so easily.

Your self-unhook attempts in the basement always succeed.

When you are unhooked or unhook yourself, you see the Killer's aura for 16/18/20 seconds.

“I haven’t let anyone get in my way before. You think I’m gonna start now?” - Sable

perks.name: Mirrored Illusion
perks.description:
A familiar spell made unfamiliar in this corrupted landscape.

This perk activates after completing a total of 20% worth of repairs on generators.

Press the Ability button 2 when next to a generator, totem, chest or exit gate to spawn a static illusion that lasts for 40/50/60 seconds.

Then, the perk deactivates.

"Just... stay there... perfect!" - Baermar

perks.name: Bardic Inspiration
perks.description:
It's time to give your audience a show. Will you bring the house down or will you choke?

Press and hold the Ability button 1 while standing and motionless to enter the performance interaction that lasts up to 15 seconds and empowers Survivors within 16 meters. Roll a d20. This effect lasts for 90 seconds if the performance is completed.

- 1 | You scream, but nothing happens
- 2-10 | Skill Checks give +1% progress
- 11-19 | Skill Checks give +2% progress
- 20 | Skill Checks give +3% progress

When the ability is canceled or the performance completes, it goes on cooldown for 110/100/90 seconds.

"Listen closely! I'm about to save your life!" - Aestri

perks.name: Still Sight
perks.description:
A clear mind and calm temperament will always find the means of their escape.

After not moving for 4/3/2 seconds, this perk activates.

Until you start moving, you see the aura of the Killer as well as all generators and chests within 24 meters.

"Breathe in. Breathe out. Now open your eyes." - Baermar

perks.name: Finesse
perks.description:
The threat of danger can motivate any creature to strengthen its resolve.

This perk activates when you are healthy.

- Your fast vaults are 20% faster.

This perk goes on cooldown for 40/35/30 seconds after performing a fast vault.

"Just need to push myself a bit further." - Lara Croft

perks.name: Hardened
perks.description:
Live long enough, and survival will run in your blood.

This perk activates after you complete all of the following:

- Unlock a chest;
- Cleanse or bless a totem.

For the rest of the trial, anytime you would scream, reveal the Killer's aura for 3/4/5 seconds instead.

"Got to keep quiet. That thing is still out there." - Lara Croft

perks.name: Specialist
perks.description:
Adventure. Exploration. Excavation. You are in your element.

Each time you open or rummage through a chest, gain 1 token, up to 6.

When you perform a great Skill Check on a generator, consume all tokens. Then, for each token consumed, reduce the maximum required generator progress by 2/3/4.

"Well, then. Doesn't this feel familiar?" - Lara Croft

perks.name: Eyes of Belmont
perks.description:
A history of vampire-hunting imbues the bloodline with certain abilities.

When a generator is completed, the aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 1/2/3 seconds.

Whenever a Killer's aura is revealed for a specified amount of time, that time is increased by 2 seconds.

"Ha! Your secret has been revealed!" - Trevor

perks.name: Exultation
perks.description:
Fortune favors the bold, even in the darkest corners of existence.

Stunning the Killer with a pallet upgrades your held item rarity to the next tier, then recharges 75% of the item's maximum charges.

This perk has a 30/25/20-second cooldown.

"You will not take me this day!" - Trevor

perks.name: Moment of Glory
perks.description:
A hero should always have the chance to make a comeback.

This perk activates after you open or rummage through 2 chests.

When you become injured, you also become Broken.

Automatically heal 1 health state after 80/70/60 seconds. Then, this perk deactivates.

This effect is canceled if you enter the dying state.

This perk will not activate if you are already suffering from the Broken status effect.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

"Never lose hope for a brighter tomorrow." - Trevor

perks.name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows
perks.description:
When in the Basement, you can begin the Invocation. After a lengthy duration, you become Injured and Broken for the rest of the Trial.

In return, whenever the Killer disturbs a Crow, their aura is revealed to all Survivors.

perks.name: Clean Break
perks.description:
After you finish healing another Survivor, the next time another Survivor begins healing you, you can instantly become Broken.

After a considerable duration, you become Healthy.

perks.name: Shoulder The Burden
perks.description:
Once per Trial, if you are not on Death Hook, you can activate Shoulder The Burden before unhooking a Survivor.

When they are unhooked, they lose 1 Hook State and you gain 1 Hook State, scream, and become Exposed for a brief duration.

perks.name: Do No Harm
perks.description:
Helping those in need comes easily, no matter how dire things get.

When you heal another Survivor, for each Hook State they have, heal 30/40/50% faster and gain 3% progress for succeeding great Skill Checks.

"Look at me. My name's Orela, and I'm gonna make sure you're all right." - Orela Rose

perks.name: Duty of Care
perks.description:
You live by a code of conduct every day of your life, and are all the better for it.

When you take a protection hit while healthy, all other Survivors within 12 meters gain 25% Haste for 4/5/6 seconds.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

"Don't worry about me. I've got a knack for bouncing back."

- Orela Rose

perks.name: Rapid Response
perks.description:
When the moment comes, you give it your all. Your survival depends on it.

When you do a Fast Locker Exit, you suffer from the Exhausted status effect for 30/25/20 seconds.

When you gain Exhausted, you see the Killer's aura for 2 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating other perks that cause Exhausted.

"All right. You got this. 3... 2... 1... go!" - Orela Rose

perks.name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity
perks.description:
You salvage what little there is to defend your team.

After unlocking or rummaging through 2 chests, press Ability Button 1 for 4 seconds next to a broken pallet to build a fragile pallet.

You see the auras of broken pallets within 24/28/32 meters.

Fragile pallets are destroyed when dropped.

“Without the fences, this place is worthless.” —Rick Grimes

perks.name: Come and Get Me!
perks.description:
You’ll risk your life to save others.

After unhooking a Survivor, while crouched and idle, press Ability button 1 to make injured and dying Survivors within 24 meters leave no scratch marks or pools of blood or make grunts of pain for 10/12.5/15 seconds.

You scream and the Killer sees your aura for 5 seconds.

“We're the ones who live.” —Rick Grimes

perks.name: Teamwork: Toughen Up
perks.description:
You maintain your composure under immense amounts of pain.

When another Survivor pallet-stuns or blinds the Killer while you are injured and within 24 meters, your grunts of pain, scratch marks, and pools of blood are reduced by 100% for 20/25/30 seconds.

“They're fucking with the wrong people.” —Rick Grimes

perks.name: Conviction
perks.description:
Sometimes one last push means the difference between death and survival.

After you have healed 1 other Survivor, while downed with at least 25% recovery progress, press the Ability button 2 to recover instantly.

You gain Broken, then are downed again after 20/25/30 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

"It's enough to keep going. Keep trying. Keep fighting. Keep dreaming." - Michonne Grimes

perks.name: Last Stand
perks.description:
Even when things are at their worst, your spirit is indomitable.

After spending 120/105/90 seconds in the Killer's Terror Radius while not in chase, when you fast-vault, stun the Killer for 3 seconds if they are within 2.5 meters.

Then, this perk is disabled for the rest of the trial.

"Some bullies, you can live with. Others, you gotta fight."

- Michonne Grimes

perks.name: Teamwork: Throw Down
perks.description:
You know the best way to even the odds is to empower those around you.

When you pallet-stun or blind the Killer, other injured Survivors within 24 meters gain Endurance and see the Killer's aura for 6/8/10 seconds.

Endurance prevents a Survivor from being downed, inflicting Deep Wound instead.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

"Facing evil brings good people together." - Michonne Grimes

perks.name: Road Life
perks.description:
Faulty amps, sweaty dives, broken-down vans… nothing makes you feel more alive.

While injured, not Broken and repairing a generator, gain 1 token for each regular great Skill Check success.

When you have 6/5/4 tokens, spend all tokens and gain 100% healing speed until you stop healing.

Lose 1 token when you fail a regular Skill Check.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

“Remind me to teach you how to patch your own pedals, Krit.” — Vee Boonyasak

perks.name: ONE-TWO-THREE-FOUR!
perks.description:
A steady beat makes for steady work. Press Active Ability button 2 while standing and idle to enter the "performance" interaction that lasts up to 15 seconds and empowers Survivors within 16 meters. You will get continuous Skill Checks during the performance. The effect lasts for 90 seconds if the performance is completed.
    - Increases the odds of getting healing and repair Skill Checks by 20%.
When the ability is canceled or the performance completes, it goes on cooldown for 110/100/90 seconds. “We are loud! We are heavy! WE ARE AXEKICK!” — Vee Boonyasak

perks.name: Ghost Notes
perks.description:
You know that the best breakdowns precede the biggest build-ups.

While you have Exhausted, your scratch marks disappear 50% faster.

You recover 5/7.5/10% faster from Exhausted.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating other perks that cause Exhausted.

“Let’s take it to the bridge!” — Vee Boonyasak

perks.name: Saboteur
perks.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability.

- See hook auras in a 56 meter radius from the pickup spot if another Survivor is being carried. Scourge Hooks are shown in yellow.
- Unlocks the ability to sabotage hooks without a Toolbox.
- Sabotaging a hook without a Toolbox takes 2.3 seconds.
- The sabotage action has a 70/65/60 second cooldown.

perks.name: Keep Them Waiting
perks.description:
You become obsessed with one Survivor.

Earn a token for each successful basic attack that is not dealt to the Obsession. Each token grants a stackable 4% decreased successful basic attack cooldown, up to 6/7/8 tokens.

When you hit the Obsession with a Basic Attack or Special Attack, lose 2 tokens. You cannot gain tokens while your Obsession is sacrificed or killed.

The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.

perks.name: Second Wind
perks.description:
When you have healed other Survivors for the equivalent of one health state, Second Wind activates. If you are already afflicted by the Broken status effect, Second Wind does not activate.

While Second Wind is activated, the next time you are unhooked or you unhook yourself, you are affected by the Broken status effect. After a total duration of 28/24/20 seconds, Second Wind automatically heals you from injured to healthy.

Second Wind deactivates once you become healthy or if you are put into the dying state before Second Wind successfully triggers. You lose the Broken status effect.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

perks.name: Self-Care
perks.description: Unlocks the Self Care ability, which allows you to heal without a Med-kit at 25/30/35% normal healing speed.

perks.name: Unbreakable
perks.description:
Past battles have taught you a thing or two about survival.

Grants the ability to fully recover from the dying state once per trial. Increases dying recovery speed by 25/30/35%.

perks.name: Shadowborn
perks.description:
You have a keen vision in the darkness of the night.

When blinded by any means, gain 6/8/10% Haste for 10 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

perks.name: Slippery Meat
perks.description:
You have developed an efficient way to get off hooks.

- Unlocks the ability to attempt to unhook yourself.
- Grants up to 3 extra escape attempts on the hook.
- Hook escape attempts have a 2/3/4% increased chance to succeed.

perks.name: Sloppy Butcher
perks.description:
You know where to hit to make them bleed.

Wounds inflicted by basic attacks cause Survivors to suffer from the Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 70/80/90 seconds.
- Increases the rate at which healing progression is lost from Hemorrhage by 25%.Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

perks.name: Small Game
perks.description: You have the undeniable capability to sense danger. Get an auditory warning when looking in the direction of Totems in a 45-degree cone within a range of 8/10/12 meters. Small Game has a cooldown of 14/12/10 seconds each time it activates. For each Dull Totem and Hex Totem cleansed by any player, gain a Token. Small Game's detection cone is reduced by 5 degrees per token.

perks.name: Down To The Last
perks.description:
As more of your friends fall to the Killer, you become shrouded in isolation and the Killer's aura-reading abilities towards you are disrupted.

Every time a fellow Survivor is killed or sacrificed, gain a token. For each token, your aura cannot be read by The Killer within a max range of 20/22/24 meters.

When you're the last Survivor alive:
- Gain 75% action speed when repairing generators.
- Gain 50% action speed while opening an exit gate or the Hatch.

Increases your chances of being The Killer's Obsession.

The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.

perks.name: Solidarity
perks.description:
Sharing painful experiences has the power to heal.

While injured, healing a Survivor without using a Med-kit also heals you at a 50/60/70% conversion rate.

perks.name: Soul Guard
perks.description:
You have been through immense hardship and you’re stronger for it.

Gain the Endurance status effect for 4/6/8 seconds after being healed or having recovered from the dying state.

While cursed by a Hex, you can fully recover from the dying state.

This effect can only trigger once every 30 seconds.

Endurance prevents a Survivor from being downed, inflicting Deep Wound instead.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

perks.name: Spies from the Shadows
perks.description:
The crows found in the world can communicate with you directly.

100% of the time, cawing crows give you a visual cue when you are within a 20/28/36 meter range.

Spies From The Shadows has a cooldown of 5 seconds.

perks.name: Spine Chill
perks.description:
An unnatural tingle warns you of impending doom.

Get notified when the Killer is looking at you with a clear line of sight within a 36-meter range. Your speed while repairing, sabotaging, healing, unhooking, cleansing, blessing, opening exit gates and unlocking is increased by 2/4/6%.
- The effects of Spine Chill linger for 0.5 seconds after the Killer looks away or is out of range.

perks.name: Spirit Fury
perks.description:
Each pallet you break magnifies the wrath of The Entity.

After you break 4/3/2 pallets, the next time you are stunned by a pallet, The Entity will instantly break the pallet.

You still suffer from the stun effect penalty.

perks.name: Sprint Burst
perks.description:
When you start running, gain 50% Haste for a maximum of 3 seconds.

Causes the Exhausted status effect for 60/50/40 seconds.

Sprint Burst cannot be used while Exhausted.

You do not recover from the Exhausted status effect while running.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

perks.name: Stake Out
perks.description:
Getting close to the Killer fills you with determination. For each 15 seconds you are standing within the Killer Terror Radius and not in a chase, you gain a token up to a maximum of 2/3/4 tokens.

When Stake Out has at least 1 token, good Skill Checks are considered great Skill Checks, consume 1 token, and grant an additional 1% bonus to generator repair progress.

perks.name: Streetwise
perks.description:
Long nights out taught you to do a lot with what you've got.

The first time you deplete an Item with charges, see the Killer's Aura for 8 seconds.

Items with charges retrieved from Chests have +60/70/80% charges.

"You're doing it wrong! Let me show you how it's done." - Nea

perks.name: Stridor
perks.description:
You are acutely sensitive to the breathing of your prey.

Breathing of Survivors in pain is 30/40/50% louder and regular breathing is 15/20/25% louder.

perks.name: Surge
perks.description:
Your eerie presence charges the air and interferes with technology.

Putting a Survivor into the dying state with a basic attack causes all generators within a 32-meter radius to explode instantly and begin regressing. Survivors repairing the generator will scream. Generators affected by Surge immediately lose 6/7/8% of their progress.

perks.name: Surveillance
perks.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability. Any regressing generator will be highlighted by a white aura. If the regression is interrupted on a generator, it will be highlighted by a yellow aura for 8/12/16 seconds.

Noises created by generator repairs are audible at an additional 8 meters.

perks.name: Technician
perks.description:
You are apt at handling machinery with the greatest care and precision.

The noises caused by your repairs and their hearing distance are reduced by 8 meters.

On a failed repair Skill Check, the following effects happen:

- The generator explosion will be prevented.
- The generator loses progress as usual.
- An additional 5/4/3% progress is lost.

perks.name: Tenacity
perks.description:
There is nothing stopping you.

Your ferocious tenacity in dire situations allows you to, while in the dying state, have 15/20/25% Haste and gain recovery progress while crawling. While you are in the dying state, your aura cannot be read by the Killer and Grunts of pain are reduced by 75%.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Territorial Imperative
perks.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability. Survivors' auras are revealed to you for 4/5/6 seconds when they enter the basement and you are more than 24 meters away from the basement entrance.

Territorial Imperative can only be triggered once every 45 seconds.

perks.name: Thanatophobia
perks.description:
Their courage fades in the face of undeniable mortality.

- For each injured, dying, or hooked Survivor, all Survivors receive a penalty of 1/1.5/2% to repair, sabotage and Totem-cleansing speeds.
- If there are 4 injured, dying or hooked Survivors, there is an additional 12% penalty to repair, sabotage and Totem-cleansing speeds.

perks.name: Mettle of Man
perks.description:
Evil has a way of always finding you.

After you earn 3 Protection Hit scoring events, Mettle of Man activates.

Once activated, the next occasion that would put you into the dying state from the injured state is ignored.

The next time you heal back to full health, your aura will be revealed to the Killer when you are further than 12/14/16 meters from the Killer.

Mettle of Man will deactivate the next time you are put into the dying state.

- Increases your chances to be the Killer’s Obsession.

The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.

perks.name: This Is Not Happening
perks.description: You perform at your best when you are under extreme stress. Great Skill Check success zones when repairing and healing get 10/20/30% bigger when you are injured.

perks.name: Thrilling Tremors
perks.description:
Your dark designs and shrewd composure rouse The Entity.

After picking up a Survivor, all Generators not being repaired by Survivors are blocked by The Entity and cannot be repaired for the next 16 seconds. Affected generators are highlighted by a white aura.

Thrilling Tremors can only be triggered once every 40/35/30 seconds.

perks.name: Tinkerer
perks.description:
Whenever a generator is repaired to 70% progress, it triggers a loud noise notification and you are granted the Undetectable status effect for the next 12/14/16 seconds. This effect can only be triggered once on each generator.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

perks.name: Trail of Torment
perks.description:
You guide your victims along a path of pain and punishment.

After damaging a generator, you become Undetectable until the generator stops regressing. During this time, the generator’s yellow aura is revealed to Survivors.

This effect can only trigger once every 60/45/30 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

perks.name: Unnerving Presence
perks.description:
Your presence alone instills great fear.

Survivors within your Terror Radius have a 10% greater chance of triggering Skill Checks when repairing or healing. Triggered Skill Checks' success zones are reduced by 40/50/60%.

perks.name: Unrelenting
perks.description: You recuperate faster from missed attacks made with your main weapon. The cooldown after missed basic attacks is reduced by 20/25/30%.

perks.name: Up the Ante
perks.description:
All will be well in the end; you just know it. Your confidence strengthens the feeling of hope for those around you.

For each other Survivor still alive, grant a 1/2/3% bonus of luck to all remaining Survivors.

Unlocks the ability to attempt to unhook yourself for all Survivors.

perks.name: Urban Evasion
perks.description:
Years of evading the cops taught you a thing or two about stealth.

While crouching, you have 90/95/100% Haste.

Haste increases Survivor movement speed.

perks.name: Vigil
perks.description:
You look over your friends even in dire situations.

You and Survivors within 16 meters recover 44/55/66% faster from the Blindness, Broken, Exhausted, Exposed, Hemorrhage, Hindered, Mangled and Oblivious status effects.

Survivors can only be affected by one Vigil's effect at a time.

Once out of range, this effect persists for 15 seconds.

perks.name: Visionary
perks.description:
You’re remarkably focused on your means of escape.

You see generator’s auras within 32 meters.

Anytime a generator is completed, Visionary is disabled for 20/18/16 seconds.

perks.name: Wake Up!
perks.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability. Once all generators are powered, exit gates are revealed to you. While opening the exit gates, reveal your aura to other Survivors.

While this perk is active, open the exit gates 8/10/12.5% faster for each Survivor still alive.

perks.name: We'll make it
perks.description:
Helping others heightens your morale.

When you rescue a Survivor from a hook, gain a 100% speed increase while healing others for 30/60/90 seconds.

perks.name: We're Gonna Live Forever
perks.description:
Your few friends deserve the best protection.

When healing another Survivor in the dying state, your healing speed is increased by 100%.

Once healing is complete, the healed Survivor gains the Endurance status effect for 6/8/10 seconds. This effect has a 30-second cooldown.

Endurance prevents a Survivor from being downed, inflicting Deep Wound instead.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

perks.name: Whispers
perks.description:
You have a rudimentary understanding of The Entity's voice.

Sporadically hear The Entity's whisper when standing within a 48/40/32 meter range of a Survivor.

perks.name: Windows of Opportunity
perks.description: Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability. Auras of pallets, breakable walls, and vault locations are revealed to you when within a 24/28/32 meter range.

perks.name: Zanshin Tactics
perks.description:
You are mentally alert and aware of nearby enemies in retreat.

Reveal the aura of pallets and vaults within 32 meters. Survivors who drop pallets are revealed to you for 3/4/5 seconds.

perks.name: Turn Back The Clock
perks.description:
After hooking a Survivor, Turn Back The Clock activates for 40/50/60 seconds.

While active, press the Active Ability button to explode the most progressed Generator within 20 meters of you. It loses 10% progress and begins regressing.

Turn Back The Clock then deactivates.

perks.name: Secret Project
perks.description:
When a Totem is blessed or cleansed, block a random unblocked generator for 20/25/30 seconds.

When 1 or more generators become blocked, you gain Undetectable for 30 seconds.

perks.name: Hex: Hive Mind
perks.description:
The first time you hook any Survivor, a Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem.

While active, generator auras show repair progress intensity.

When 1 generator remains, all remaining generators explode, lose 6/8/10% progress, start regressing, and the Hex Totem becomes dull.

perks.name: Extrasensory Perception
perks.description:
After crouching for 4 seconds, you see auras in an expanding radius up to 44 meters, and gain Elusive and Oblivious.

When you stop crouching or after 11 seconds, this perk enters a 60/50/40-second cooldown.

perks.name: We See You
perks.description:
When the Killer reveals your aura, gain 1 token.

When you have 4 tokens, spend all tokens and you and other Survivors see the Killer's aura for 10/12.5/15 seconds.

This perk has a 10-second cooldown.

perks.name: Teamwork: Soft-Spoken
perks.description:
For each other Survivor repairing a generator with you, the range at which generator repair noise is heard is reduced by 15/20/25%.

While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair 5% faster.

perks.name: Bada Bada Boom
perks.description:
After completing 20% worth of repairs, press Ability button 1 next to a window to trap it for 40/50/60 seconds.

The trap triggers when the Killer performs a vault on the window, inflicting them with 50% Hindered for 6 seconds.

perks.name: Change of Plan
perks.description:
You start with 2 tokens.

While inside a locker and holding a non-event Toolbox, press Ability button 2 to spend 1 token and transform your Toolbox into a Med-kit of the same rarity with a random add-on of the same rarity.

The new Med-kit has 80/90/100% of its charges.

perks.name: Teamwork: Full Circuit
perks.description:
For each other Survivor repairing a generator with you, the size of the Good Skill Check zone is increased by 15/20/25%.

While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair 5% faster.

perks.name: A Place For Us
perks.description:
While healing another Survivor, you both gain Elusive.

Whenever you finish healing the Obsession, you both gain Elusive for 20/25/30 seconds.

When the Trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.

perks.name: Five Moves Ahead
perks.description:
While you are in the Killer's Terror Radius or are being chased by the Killer:
- You see the auras of the 5 closest Pallets and Windows.
- After you drop a Pallet, you start moving 50% earlier.

Whenever you drop a Pallet, Five Moves Ahead goes on cooldown for 40/35/30 seconds.

perks.name: Flow State
perks.description:
Whenever a Generator is completed, earn 1 Token, up to 5.

For each Token, you bless and cleanse Totems 8/9/10% faster, heal 8/9/10% faster, and unhook Survivors 8/9/10% faster.

maps.name: Greenville Square
maps.description:
A thin slice of small-town Americana, long abandoned, long forgotten.

Greenville was always meant to be a place for those who felt like they didn’t belong, a town founded by pilgrims fleeing persecution. Those pilgrims still watch over the environment, their fierce determination lovingly portrayed in a statue that stands tall in the center of town.

Now in the Entity’s Realm, something wanders freely along the overgrown streets: a writhing creature responsible for a string of disappearances across the country going back decades. Even the local cinema, a hub of fantasy and escapism, provides no sanctuary from the evil that will never die.

maps.name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza
maps.description: The rotting brainchild of a sadistic murderer still stands over the grassy plains. A place of joy for some, and unspeakable terror for others. Do not let the bright colors and parlor tricks deceive you; many have died within these walls, and many more will die still.

maps.name: Fallen Refuge
maps.description:
Amid the overgrown grass, a new structure rose from the darkness. Twisted and contorted as if from a dream, melding the architecture of a prison tower—an erstwhile safe haven for the survivors of an apocalyptic outbreak—and a hospital that once healed the people of King County.

Its cruel form stretches into the night sky, a mockery of what these structures represented. Symbols of security and compassion, corrupted into cruel reminders that those in the Entity's realm are always watched… and can never leave.

maps.name: Disturbed Ward
maps.description: The last standing structure after the fire that still shows the grandeur of the original architecture. Its two floors and dark basement leave behind nothing of the tale of horrors that took place here. Nothing but memories linger in the abandoned rooms.

maps.name: Father Campbell's Chapel
maps.description:
Nestled in a quiet part of the grounds, Father Campbell’s Chapel was a haven from the horrors of the rest of the asylum. Those patients whose illnesses were less severe were given the run of the place and many would come here for refuge, to communicate with God and confess their sins.

Sadly, Father Campbell’s legacy of good works counted for nothing when the Nurse’s mind snapped, and he drew his final breath in the confessional that had helped so many.

Now the chapel has been joined by a strange companion: a carny’s caravan, pulled by a shadowy horse. It has long traveled through The Fog, moving from realm to realm, and now temporarily camps here.

Beware: only a fool would let the bright colors seduce them into visiting.

maps.name: Mother's Dwelling
maps.description: Deep in a forest with many names lies a hidden home. The family that once lived there was dependent on the forest… and was broken by it. More than a century old, the dwelling is in surprisingly good condition, though it shows signs of often being patched and mended. The forest holds the house tightly in its grasp, growing over and around it like a second skin. Only once inside is it clear that someone still lives there. It is warm and welcoming and lovingly decorated, with a large living space, a bedroom and a corner dedicated for little ones. Here they are protected from the harsh winter of the northern forest.

maps.name: The Temple of Purgation
maps.description:
The half-forgotten temple complex dedicated to the cleansing of the High Priestess’s followers. The vertiginous hypostyle hall was believed to hold the weight of the heavens.

Stolen from the memories of The Plague, the temple was planted in the howling Red Forest, whose winds eroded its smooth edges. It now stands as a beacon of fear, visible from all cardinal points.

maps.name: Raccoon City Police Station East Wing
maps.description: The smell of blood and festering limbs permeated the concrete walls of the Raccoon City police station. Once an art museum, the building was converted into a precinct at the heart of the city. But when evil took residence, the station showed one last terrifying exhibition: corpses crowding narrow corridors, blood smeared on shattered windows, and festering flesh dripping down the stairs.

maps.name: Raccoon City Police Station West Wing
maps.description: The smell of blood and festering limbs permeated the concrete walls of the Raccoon City police station. Once an art museum, the building was converted into a precinct at the heart of the city. But when evil took residence, the station showed one last terrifying exhibition: corpses crowding narrow corridors, blood smeared on shattered windows, and festering flesh dripping down the stairs.

maps.name: Badham Preschool I
maps.description: This is not the Badham Preschool where children laughed and learned, made lifelong friendships and had their paintings hung on the walls. This is a dark echo created from the nightmares of those who suffered there. The walls creak under the burden of history. Events that should be long forgotten are recorded forever in the plaster and stone, pervading the building with misery. Only one part of the building is accurately reflected in this darkness. The squalid room where Freddy Krueger lived and worked. The hidden basement area where he committed the heinous acts that appalled a town and condemned him to death. This is a place of the subconscious, of the nightmare brought into hideous reality.

maps.name: Badham Preschool II
maps.description: This is not the Badham Preschool where children laughed and learned, made lifelong friendships and had their paintings hung on the walls. This is a dark echo created from the nightmares of those who suffered there. The walls creak under the burden of history. Events that should be long forgotten are recorded forever in the plaster and stone, pervading the building with misery. Only one part of the building is accurately reflected in this darkness. The squalid room where Freddy Krueger lived and worked. The hidden basement area where he committed the heinous acts that appalled a town and condemned him to death. This is a place of the subconscious, of the nightmare brought into hideous reality.

maps.name: Badham Preschool III
maps.description: This is not the Badham Preschool where children laughed and learned, made lifelong friendships and had their paintings hung on the walls. This is a dark echo created from the nightmares of those who suffered there. The walls creak under the burden of history. Events that should be long forgotten are recorded forever in the plaster and stone, pervading the building with misery. Only one part of the building is accurately reflected in this darkness. The squalid room where Freddy Krueger lived and worked. The hidden basement area where he committed the heinous acts that appalled a town and condemned him to death. This is a place of the subconscious, of the nightmare brought into hideous reality.

maps.name: Badham Preschool IV
maps.description: This is not the Badham Preschool where children laughed and learned, made lifelong friendships and had their paintings hung on the walls. This is a dark echo created from the nightmares of those who suffered there. The walls creak under the burden of history. Events that should be long forgotten are recorded forever in the plaster and stone, pervading the building with misery. Only one part of the building is accurately reflected in this darkness. The squalid room where Freddy Krueger lived and worked. The hidden basement area where he committed the heinous acts that appalled a town and condemned him to death. This is a place of the subconscious, of the nightmare brought into hideous reality.

maps.name: Badham Preschool V
maps.description: This is not the Badham Preschool where children laughed and learned, made lifelong friendships and had their paintings hung on the walls. This is a dark echo created from the nightmares of those who suffered there. The walls creak under the burden of history. Events that should be long forgotten are recorded forever in the plaster and stone, pervading the building with misery. Only one part of the building is accurately reflected in this darkness. The squalid room where Freddy Krueger lived and worked. The hidden basement area where he committed the heinous acts that appalled a town and condemned him to death. This is a place of the subconscious, of the nightmare brought into hideous reality.

maps.name: The Game
maps.description:
This industrial warehouse is the product of a fevered mind, desperately trying to complete their life’s work, their legacy, before their inevitable end. A place of both, creation and destruction, from which devices of death and rebirth were produced. The smell of fear, blood and death has soaked into the brick walls. The sickly glow of fluorescent lighting bathes the room where Jigsaw has planned out his final trial.

The game begins.

maps.name: Fractured Cowshed
maps.description: The old run-down cowshed was one of the first barns the Thompsons built on Coldwind Farm. It was originally intended to house sick animals at a safe distance from the rest of the livestock, but no animal who entered it ever survived. An investigation revealed the building was infested with toxic mold. The Thompsons figured it must be a construction fault or something to do with the dampness of the wood. A new barn was built, and the old cowshed was left to rot in the shadows.

maps.name: Rotten Fields
maps.description: Even before the fall of Coldwind Farm, the cornfields were surrounded by tales of ominous myths. Everything from mutilated animals to red corn stalks. Now it’s abandoned, but still, someone seems to care for the corn in some way as the stalks still stand tall.

maps.name: The Thompson House
maps.description: The centerpiece of Coldwind Farm, the farmhouse stood proudly over the fields of golden corn for decades. After the horrific events of 1972, the building fell into disrepair and eventual ruin. The farmhouse is now nothing more than a forgotten, former home where holidays were once celebrated.

maps.name: Torment Creek
maps.description: The Silo is one of the oldest remaining buildings that made up Coldwind Farm. The great storm of 2003 brought the ancient structure crashing down. It was weeks later that searchers discovered twelve bodies were buried in the ruins. Their crushed corpses were buried deep in the slurry that oozed out from the base and made identification almost impossible.

maps.name: Rancid Abattoir
maps.description: Once part of the farm, the slaughterhouse was still in operation for many years after the breakup of the farmland. Rotting stench and stained floors provide proof of all the deaths that have taken place here… animal or otherwise.

maps.name: Ormond Lake Mine
maps.description:
Tucked among the majestic slopes near Ormond there lies a deep scar running through the rock and roots. The promise of its vast natural resources drew unscrupulous surveyors to its ice-capped peaks. Upon discovering rich coal deposits, they set up shop, but a series of unexplainable mishaps forced them to close the mine before it was exhausted.

They abandoned the complex and left the nearby town to pick up the pieces. After laying silent for decades, rumors swirl that someone else has taken residence among the rusting machines... a group whose motivations are far darker, and far more mysterious.

At night, an uneasy silence falls over the complex, punctuated only by the groaning of decaying machines.

maps.name: Treatment Theater
maps.description: A mansion from the late 1800's - donated and transformed into a medical facility and later into a CIA black site specializing in cutting-edge interrogation techniques. The institute closing is shrouded in controversy and mystery. At the heart of the facility, the Doctor’s tools have been arranged in a twisted ritual circle, ready for research, as he refines his methods on an endless stream of terrified patients.

maps.name: Family Residence
maps.description:
While the Yamaoka estate displayed a glorious past, but the family residence was falling apart. The house needed numerous renovations to remain habitable.

The last generation of the Yamaoka family were facing troubled times. Their finances were dire and the situation worsened when the daughter started university, just a few months before the mother became ill. Shouldering both university fees and hospital bills, the father worked past exhaustion.

To keep a roof over their heads, he profaned their legacy. The walls of their ancestral home were sealed with moldy materials for a cheap fix.

As the house was stripped of its integrity, an old anger was awakened.

maps.name: Family Residence
maps.description:
While the Yamaoka estate displayed a glorious past, but the family residence was falling apart. The house needed numerous renovations to remain habitable.

The last generation of the Yamaoka family were facing troubled times. Their finances were dire and the situation worsened when the daughter started university, just a few months before the mother became ill. Shouldering both university fees and hospital bills, the father worked past exhaustion.

To keep a roof over their heads, he profaned their legacy. The walls of their ancestral home were sealed with moldy materials for a cheap fix.

As the house was stripped of its integrity, an old anger was awakened.

maps.name: Sanctum of Wrath
maps.description:
Once opulent and well-tended by priests, the shrine was abandoned for reasons unknown. Season after season, the harsh and unforgiving weather corroded its grandeur. Paths that welcomed weary travelers, were now thick with vegetation growing damp and unrestrained. The sculptures were a haven for moss and lichen, concealing a scratched and brittle stone.

Kazan shuddered with rage as he stepped into the area. Unable to restrain himself, he unleashed his might on a statue atop the shrine, clubbing its arms and head to pieces. Even after he left, a rot seemed to pervade the air. The chimes of bells played softly on the wind, as everything around them crumbled. Torn from Kazan's memories, the shrine now stood on the estate of his childhood home—a trick by The Entity that infuriated him even more.

maps.name: Sanctum of Wrath
maps.description:
Once opulent and well-tended by priests, the shrine was abandoned for reasons unknown. Season after season, the harsh and unforgiving weather corroded its grandeur. Paths that welcomed weary travelers, were now thick with vegetation growing damp and unrestrained. The sculptures were a haven for moss and lichen, concealing a scratched and brittle stone.

Kazan shuddered with rage as he stepped into the area. Unable to restrain himself, he unleashed his might on a statue atop the shrine, clubbing its arms and head to pieces. Even after he left, a rot seemed to pervade the air. The chimes of bells played softly on the wind, as everything around them crumbled. Torn from Kazan's memories, the shrine now stood on the estate of his childhood home—a trick by The Entity that infuriated him even more.

maps.name: Coal Tower
maps.description: Once used for storing the coal that fueled the Foundry, it now lies abandoned. The roof is split wide open, suggesting some titanic explosion, but the angles don’t seem to make sense. So to fathom its destiny is not done easily - even if one would want to.

maps.name: Coal Tower
maps.description: Once used for storing the coal that fueled the Foundry, it now lies abandoned. The roof is split wide open, suggesting some titanic explosion, but the angles don’t seem to make sense. So to fathom its destiny is not done easily - even if one would want to.

maps.name: Shelter Woods
maps.description: A makeshift command center was erected here, its rigid walls and sharp angles standing in stark contrast to the twisted wood and soil. For those who chance upon this crude structure, the realization that this complex belongs to an apex hunter—a hunter whose prey is human—usually comes too late.

maps.name: Shelter Woods
maps.description: A makeshift command center was erected here, its rigid walls and sharp angles standing in stark contrast to the twisted wood and soil. For those who chance upon this crude structure, the realization that this complex belongs to an apex hunter—a hunter whose prey is human—usually comes too late.

maps.name: Ironworks of Misery
maps.description: The beating heart of the Mine, the Foundry was where the iron ore was directly smelted into vast ingots. The huge vats still bear evidence of the bodies that were incinerated within them - preserved in the metal residue.

maps.name: Ironworks of Misery
maps.description: The beating heart of the Mine, the Foundry was where the iron ore was directly smelted into vast ingots. The huge vats still bear evidence of the bodies that were incinerated within them - preserved in the metal residue.

maps.name: Suffocation Pit
maps.description: You can still see the tiny entrance that miners used to haul the ore to the surface. Now it is nothing more than a pile of rubble. No one bothered to clear it as they feared whatever might be found inside. Instead it fell into oblivion.

maps.name: Suffocation Pit
maps.description: You can still see the tiny entrance that miners used to haul the ore to the surface. Now it is nothing more than a pile of rubble. No one bothered to clear it as they feared whatever might be found inside. Instead it fell into oblivion.

maps.name: Groaning Storehouse
maps.description: On the eastern edge of the estate, near the woods, lie the remains of the MacMillan warehouse. Dwarfing the surrounding buildings, the massive storehouse can often be heard creaking and groaning as if it were crying out with the anguish of the incinerated laborers.

maps.name: Groaning Storehouse
maps.description: On the eastern edge of the estate, near the woods, lie the remains of the MacMillan warehouse. Dwarfing the surrounding buildings, the massive storehouse can often be heard creaking and groaning as if it were crying out with the anguish of the incinerated laborers.

maps.name: Eyrie of Crows
maps.description:
In the dust-choked expanse of the Chilean desert lies a graveyard abandoned by the living, battered by the passage of time. Only through violence was it once more given prominence, hosting the gruesome murder of the artist Carmina Mora and her friends.

Within The Entity's realm, the humble lot has been twisted into a grand celebration of the bloody events that took place. A towering crypt offers a roost for the crows to observe the trial, beady eyes gazing with fascination, never forgetting the day they fed greedily on the flesh of screaming men and women.

maps.name: Wretched Shop
maps.description: This old garage was once not just a place of death and execution. Automobiles were actually repaired here amongst oil mixed with blood. But as investigators found out about the atrocities that took place, it became forgotten.

maps.name: Gas Heaven
maps.description: For decades, Azarov’s Gas Heaven offered the last chance for travellers to rest and fuel up before the long, hard haul through the backcountry. Wiser travellers learned to decline that offer. The phones never worked and people had a peculiar habit of going missing. When the highway came through, bypassing Gas Heaven entirely, business dried up and the gas station was abandoned. No one quite knows how many bodies are stashed out there, or what else is hidden in the ruins of the old rest stop.

maps.name: Blood Lodge
maps.description: A run-down log cabin at the edge of the scrap yard and the home of its owner. Weird carvings and etchings in the wall perhaps say more about the owner’s state of mind and allude to his disappearance. Reports suggested that prisoners were held in its dark basement before they were taken to the crusher.

maps.name: Azarov’s Resting Place
maps.description: The Office is where money changed owners and hands were shook. The heavy duty safe in the floor might have been a dead giveaway to the shady business that took place. Wads of cash were hidden all over the place. Stating that money wasn’t an issue, maybe people got executed for enjoyment, rather than wealth.

maps.name: Wreckers' Yard
maps.description: The Junkyard is packed with sharp objects. Walking around the area, aware of the bloodbath that took place here, changes the landscape. Blood-covered metal and bits of flesh abound. One does not willingly walk amongst all this evidence of death.

maps.name: Mount Ormond Resort
maps.description:
Ormond was once a small, remote ski town with idyllic slopes, but its resort turned obsolete when a deluxe ski village was built on Mount Richards less than two hours away. Mount Richards offered fresh slopes with luxurious stores and hotels, which crushed Mount Ormond’s isolated, decrepit facilities.

The fate of the mountain worsened when a mining project took interest in the coal present at its summit. The mountaintop was lined by explosives to extract coal seams from under it. The project caused a public outrage and was stopped midway.

Mount Ormond is now a soulful, deforested graveyard where gangs and teenagers go looking for trouble. Some people say that the mountain hides a darkness, a bottomless hole from where no one can return.

maps.name: Mount Ormond Resort
maps.description:
Ormond was once a small, remote ski town with idyllic slopes, but its resort turned obsolete when a deluxe ski village was built on Mount Richards less than two hours away. Mount Richards offered fresh slopes with luxurious stores and hotels, which crushed Mount Ormond’s isolated, decrepit facilities.

The fate of the mountain worsened when a mining project took interest in the coal present at its summit. The mountaintop was lined by explosives to extract coal seams from under it. The project caused a public outrage and was stopped midway.

Mount Ormond is now a soulful, deforested graveyard where gangs and teenagers go looking for trouble. Some people say that the mountain hides a darkness, a bottomless hole from where no one can return.

maps.name: Mount Ormond Resort
maps.description:
Ormond was once a small, remote ski town with idyllic slopes, but its resort turned obsolete when a deluxe ski village was built on Mount Richards less than two hours away. Mount Richards offered fresh slopes with luxurious stores and hotels, which crushed Mount Ormond’s isolated, decrepit facilities.

The fate of the mountain worsened when a mining project took interest in the coal present at its summit. The mountaintop was lined by explosives to extract coal seams from under it. The project caused a public outrage and was stopped midway.

Mount Ormond is now a soulful, deforested graveyard where gangs and teenagers go looking for trouble. Some people say that the mountain hides a darkness, a bottomless hole from where no one can return.

maps.name: Garden of Joy
maps.description:
On a privately-owned island in the Atlantic, the Garden was home to a bustling commune of optimists set on building a better world. Funded by a band of anonymous philanthropists and managed by a charismatic leader, they attempted to rid themselves of dark emotions, for fear of summoning the ancient god of shadows.

Dark thoughts corrupted this idyllic community. A mansion sits twisted by darkness and further perverted by the Entity’s influence, contorting and reconfiguring itself in maddening, serpentine formations. At once familiar and foreign, to look upon it is to know fear.

maps.name: Garden of Joy
maps.description:
On a privately-owned island in the Atlantic, the Garden was home to a bustling commune of optimists set on building a better world. Funded by a band of anonymous philanthropists and managed by a charismatic leader, they attempted to rid themselves of dark emotions, for fear of summoning the ancient god of shadows.

Dark thoughts corrupted this idyllic community. A mansion sits twisted by darkness and further perverted by the Entity’s influence, contorting and reconfiguring itself in maddening, serpentine formations. At once familiar and foreign, to look upon it is to know fear.

maps.name: The Underground Complex
maps.description:
Located below the Hawkins National Laboratory, this underground complex released dozens of interdimensional creatures in November 1984, before the rift was sealed.

The site kept some vestiges of its past as the mental health institute, including a moldy isolation tank used by patients suffering from acute anxiety that was later modernized for mind control experimentation on promising test subjects.

Now the walls of the abandoned facility are sprayed with bullets and blood, evidence of a battle against interdimensional creatures.

maps.name: The Shattered Square
maps.description:
Daro, a village that once bustled with life and industry, suddenly razed to the ground. The gorgeous, cobbled roads of this medieval Italian settlement ran red with the blood of her citizens, all due to the “righteousness” of the Guardia Compagnia.

The Entity’s Realm has preserved and distorted this ancient village, its rubble forever smoldering. A large gathering hall stands in its center, still upright despite its scars. Several shacks litter the landscape in varying degrees of disrepair. The pain suffered here still emanates from the crackles of its embers.

maps.name: Forgotten Ruins
maps.description:
Pulled from the memories of alchemists, warriors, storytellers, and criminals, the Forgotten Ruins is an amalgamation of hidden knowledge and dark secrets.

How many have wandered this dead terrain, unaware of what lurked beneath their feet? And how many more ventured down to the bottom of that decaying staircase, only to succumb to what awaited them

maps.name: Grim Pantry
maps.description: One shack stood apart from the rest of the village. Once the water was drained and the area beneath the base was revealed, the true horror of the swamp's cage was discovered. It was here that the prisoners, if that's what we should call them, were brought. Held in the water, their bodies bloating horrendously, they were plucked, one by one for the family's needs. The stilts that kept the building upright acted as the only bars that awful jail needed.

maps.name: The Pale Rose
maps.description: The Pale Rose, an ancient paddle steamer in the middle of the swamp, is held captive by the stagnant mud. It has been here long before the residents began their hunt, a barely visible silhouette from the nearby village. There are signs of inhabitation, particularly in the upper states room where strange, ritualistic markings in dried blood and dirt cover the floor. From the scale of the bloodletting, something horrid has taken place here.

maps.name: Toba Landing
maps.description:
After years hurtling through the inky blackness of deep space, a solitary colony ship descended to the surface of Dvarka. Selected for its breathable air, its valuable minerals, and its beautiful lakes and forests, Dvarka looked to be the perfect planet for a new start for humanity. But exploration of the surface revealed a dark secret: an advanced civilization, completely wiped out by some unknown event.

The ship lies surrounded by strange rock formations on the alien soil of Dvarka, the light of its sun choked out by giant, twisting trees. And in the darkness, a new threat emerges: an Earth invention, twisted by alien technology, unflagging in its mission to end human life on Dvarka and beyond.

maps.name: Dead Dawg Saloon
maps.description:
An early settlement on the unforgiving frontier, the outpost of Glenvale was snuffed out in a ruthless, bloody gang war. Responding to the abduction of five brothers-in-arms, the Hellshire Gang stormed in with six-shooters and dynamite. What began as a standoff with the Mason Kelly Gang quickly broke down into a chaotic war zone. Guns fired indiscriminately in a desperate bid for self-preservation, cutting through gang members and civilians alike.

When the dust settled, the dead outnumbered the living. The hostages were discovered to have been long killed, their bodies disemboweled, guts strewn across town. In a silent rage, the few surviving Hellshire members rounded up their injured enemies and finished them in the same gruesome manner. By nightfall, only the crows remained, feasting gluttonously upon their victory.

maps.name: Midwich Elementary School
maps.description:
To students who were bullied by their teachers and classmates, attending Midwich Elementary School was comparable to torture. As the Order’s grip on the town’s supernatural energies tightened, a transformation occurred. The childhood trauma that took place in the building manifested itself into a twisted, nightmarish design.

Though desks and textbooks remain, they’re eerily contrasted with stained walls, rusted chains, and hanging cadavers. Any notion that this could have been a place of innocence and learning has long since faded.

maps.name: Nostromo Wreckage
maps.description: A brutal, industrial interstellar cargo ship, where human life takes a back seat to cruel efficiency. Death lurks around every corner of its labyrinthine decks. From the well of Ripley’s memories a grim and hopeless realm manifests into a terrifying nightmare.

maps.name: Trickster's Delusion
maps.description: A neon-drenched downtown nightmare woven from The Trickster's subconscious. Shops, street food stalls, and a nightclub twist together into a surreal performance space where the Entity exposes the fractured memories behind Ji-Woon Hak's fame.

items.name: Candelabra
items.description: In the darkest of castles, any light is a precious commodity.90 charges.While held, pushes back the fog.When used, reveals the aura of the closest incomplete generator and displays the current Survivor team actions in the HUD.When placed on a generator, all Survivors within 32 meters of that generator can see its aura.Upon completing generator with a Candelabra placed on it, generator auras will be hidden for the Killer for 15 seconds.Killers can destroy Candelabras that are on generators.

items.name: Alex's Toolbox
items.description:
A metal box containing mainly saws and vice grips of varying sizes but also other tools. Even though the content of this Toolbox is clearly aimed at destructive deeds, it can be used to repair various mechanical components as well.

18 charges.Increases repair speed by 10%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 100%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

items.name: Anniversary Toolbox
items.description:
A toolbox that’s slightly explosive.

32 charges.Increases repair speed by 50%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 50%.Detonates a firework once depleted. Yay!

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

items.name: Scribbled Map
items.description:
Peering at the parchment, a path appears in your mind. Moments later, you feel lost again.

Press the Use Item Button to reveal auras of all pallets and vaults within 32 meters for 12 seconds.Using the secondary interaction creates a beam of light at the Survivor's location. Generators within 32 meters of the beam of light are revealed with red auras.5 charges.

items.description:
The bow and shank of a key, vibrating with power.

Consume a charge to:

Reveal auras of Survivors within 48 meters for 8 seconds by holding the Use Item Button.

Begins with 6 charges.

items.name: Commodious Toolbox
items.description:
A large metal box containing basic tools and extra mechanical parts. Even without training, can be used to repair or break various mechanical components.

32 charges.Increases repair speed by 50%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 50%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

items.description:
A vaccine effective against contamination from the T-Virus.

Limited items are consumed by The Entity at the trial's end.

items.name: Dull Key
items.description:
A bent and dull Key that once held great power.

Consume a charge to:

Reveal auras of Survivors within 56 meters for 9 seconds by holding the Use Item Button.Unlock Chests quickly. Chests unlocked with this Key have a revealed aura within 42 meters, enabling another Survivor to rummage once, and will contain items of at least Rare quality.Unlock the Hatch.

Begins with 5 charges.

items.name: Engineer's Toolbox
items.description:
Metal box with highly specialized tools meant for engineering. Most of the tools can still be used by neophytes to make fast repairs or break various mechanical components.

16 charges.Increases repair speed by 100%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 10%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

items.name: Cryptic Map
items.description:
Looking at it, the directions make no sense. But merely holding it grants you an uncanny intuition.

Press the Use Item Button to reveal auras of all pallets and vaults within 24 meters for 10 seconds.Using the secondary interaction creates a beam of light at the Survivor's location. Generators within 32 meters of the beam of light are revealed with red auras.4 charges.

items.name: Third Year Party Starter
items.description:
A small, highly-explosive dinner table decoration. Detonates into loud bangs, intense light flashes, and playful confetti. Can be used as a distraction, as a blinding device or to celebrate our three years together.

1 charge.

items.name: Chinese Firecracker
items.description:
A row of small explosive devices wrapped in heavy paper casing. Detonates into loud bangs and intense light flashes. Can be used as a distraction, as a blinding device or to celebrate.

1 charge.

items.name: Flash Grenade
items.description:
A hand grenade that creates a large flash of light and a loud sound on detonation.

Limited items are consumed by The Entity at the trial's end.

items.name: Winter Party Starter
items.description:
A small, highly-explosive dinner table decoration. Detonates into loud bangs and intense light flashes. Can be used as a distraction, as a blinding device or to celebrate.

1 charge.

items.name: Flashlight

A standard Flashlight. Can be used to light your way in the darkness.

8 seconds of use.

items.name: Anniversary Flashlight
items.description:
A festive Flashlight that explodes with confetti upon blinding a Killer. Surprise!

8 Seconds of use.

items.name: Masquerade Flashlight
items.description:
Not even a mask can protect you from this Flashlight's bright beam.

8 Seconds of use.Increases confetti by 100%.

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: A Flashlight that can cause a distraction or even rescue another Survivor.

items.name: Sport Flashlight
items.description:
A very portable Flashlight with a good grip. Its efficient technology produces a powerful light while consuming less power.

8 Seconds of use.Decreases Flashlight battery consumption by 11%.Increases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 20%.

items.name: Utility Flashlight
items.description:
A sturdy but heavy Flashlight that packs a lot of power.

12 Seconds of use.Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 30%.Increases Blindness duration by 15%.Decreases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 20%.

items.name: Will O' Wisp
items.description:
A Flashlight equipped with a special lens cover that adds an orange tint and a little ghost to the beam.

8 Seconds of use. Considerably increases Friendly Ghosts in your life.

items.name: Blood Can
items.description:
The handle is slick, and blood wells between your fingers as you tighten your grip.Found when interacting with the Blood Pump. Required to carry the blood needed to repair Blood Generators.

Carry capacity of 40 liters.Produces a pool of blood when running.Generates distinct noises while being carried.Noises vary depending on movement speed and number of liters being carried.Blood leaks from the Blood Can when running or if it is left on the ground.Killers can stomp the Blood Can while on the ground, spilling more blood.Vanishes from the trial when empty.

items.name: First Aid Spray
items.description:
A medication that helps reverse the effects of Uroboros infection.

Limited items are consumed by The Entity at the trial's end.

items.name: Eye Of Vecna
items.description: When doing a Fast Locker Exit, you cannot be seen by The Lich and gains Haste for the duration of the effect.

items.name: Hand Of Vecna
items.description: When doing a Fast Locker Entry, the Survivor is teleported to a further locker.

items.name: Skeleton Key
