addons.name: Garden Rake
addons.description:
A small claw rake, a must-have tool for any accomplished gardener.

Increases the size of the Dream Snare by 10%.

addons.name: Green Dress
addons.description:
A little girl's green dress with a silky white ribbon.

Increases the time it takes for Survivors to perform the Wake Up action by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Jump Rope
addons.description:
A long double dutch jump rope, stained with many years of use.

Increases duration of Hindered when a Survivor is hit with a Dream Snare by 11%.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Kid's Drawing
addons.description: An unattributed drawing clearly crafted by a young child.Increases the amount of Sleep gained from attacking with Dream Abilities by 10%.

addons.name: Nancy's Masterpiece
addons.description:
A painting of a character, made by Nancy Holbrook at Badham and kept as a treasured memory.

Decreases Dream Projection's total cooldown by 10% after hitting a Survivor with a Dream Snare or Dream Pallet.

addons.name: Nancy's Sketch
addons.description:
A crude and bold sketch made with fusain, signed Nancy H.

Decreases Sleep immunity after a Survivor uses an alarm clock by 20%.

addons.name: Paint Thinner
addons.description:
A tin of a highly volatile and inflammable material.

When a Survivor drops a Dream Pallet, they are revealed with Killer Instinct for 6 seconds.Unlocks the ability to use Dream Projection on that Survivor while they are revealed.Increases this Dream Projection's charge speed by 100%.

addons.name: Pill Bottle
addons.description:
An empty pill bottle which once contained a medicine called Zoneral.

Each time a Survivor wakes up, their Sleep Meter fills 10% faster, up to a maximum of 50%.

addons.name: Prototype Claws
addons.description:
A homemade tool to facilitate bush trimming.

Decreases the charge time to release a Dream Snare by 10%.

addons.name: Red Paint Brush
addons.description:
A large paint brush, wet with crimson paint.

Reveals the aura of Survivors in the Dream World when they are further than 32 meters away.Increases each Survivor's Sleep Meter by 50%.

addons.name: Outdoor Rope
addons.description:
Sturdy outdoor rope, handy to tie up anything.

While Survivors are in the Dream World:

Increases the speed at which the Dream Snare travels by 15%.

addons.name: Sheep Block
addons.description: A white and blue wooden block depicting two wooly lamb grazing and the letter "S".Increases the Alarm Clocks' cooldown by 10%.

addons.name: Swing Chains
addons.description:
Rusty but sturdy chains used to securely attach a swing seat.

After using Dream Projection, block all window vaults within 16 meters for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Unicorn Block
addons.description:
A white and red wooden block depicting a prancing unicorn and the letter "U".

Increases the Dream Pallets' rupture radius by 14%.

addons.name: Wool Shirt
addons.description:
A small boy's orange and yellow striped shirt. Identified with a sewn name tag to "Jesse".

Decreases the delay before Dream Pallets rupture by 10%.

addons.name: "Z" Block
addons.description:
A deeply scratched and burnt wooden block which only recognizable feature is the letter "Z".

Survivors hit with a Dream Snare or Dream Pallet are revealed for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Battery
addons.description:
A standard battery of unknown brand.

Adds 2 seconds of use to the Flashlight.

addons.name: Heavy Duty Battery
addons.description:
A battery marked as "industrial strength."

Adds 4 seconds of use to the Flashlight.

addons.name: Focus Lens
addons.description:
A thick glass lens that focuses the Flashlight beam to increase its intensity.

Increases the range of the Flashlight beam by 25%.Decreases the width of the Flashlight beam by 15%.Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 20%.Increases Blindness duration by 10%.

addons.name: Wide Lens
addons.description:
A thin wide lens in perfect condition. Designed to spread the Flashlight beam at the cost of reducing its range of effectiveness.

Decreases the range of the Flashlight beam by 25%.Increases the width of the Flashlight beam by 25%.

addons.name: Power Bulb
addons.description:
A tiny Flashlight bulb that packs more wattage for a brighter, more powerful light beam.

Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 20%.Increases Blindness duration by 10%.

addons.name: TIR Optic
addons.description:
A lens and reflector combo which can magnify a Flashlight's beam.

Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 30%.Increases Blindness duration by 15%.

addons.name: Low Amp Filament
addons.description:
A filament bulb designed to extend a Flashlight battery's life.

Decreases Flashlight battery consumption by 24%.

addons.name: Leather Grip
addons.description:
A leather strip wrapped around the Flashlight for more grip.

Increases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 20%.

addons.name: Broken Bulb
addons.description:
A damaged bulb that causes a spooky flickering effect.

Causes the Flashlight to flicker.Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 15%.Increases Blindness duration by 30%.Increases the spookiness just a little.

addons.name: High-end Sapphire lens
addons.description:
A wide lens made of unscratchable sapphire that optimises the power and range of the light beam.

Increases the range of the Flashlight beam by 25%.Increases the width of the Flashlight beam by 25%.Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 30%.Increases Blindness duration by 15%.

addons.name: Intense Halogen
addons.description:
A chemical bulb that generates an intensely clear light.

Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 40%.Increases Blindness duration by 20%.

addons.name: Long Life Battery
addons.description:
A recent model of battery that lasts longer.

Adds 6 seconds of use to the Flashlight.

addons.name: Odd Bulb
addons.description:
A heavy and completely opaque bulb of unknown origin which emits a faint light even when turned off.

Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 50%.Increases Blindness duration by 25%.Increases Flashlight battery consumption by 12%.

addons.name: Rubber Grip
addons.description:
A rubber grip specifically fitting Flashlights for more grip.

Increases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 40%.

addons.name: Volcanic Stone
addons.description:
The heat of its birthplace glows within this living rock.

Decreases the Fog Vial cooldown by 5 seconds.

addons.name: Mushroom Formula
addons.description:
Blooming wisps of fog grasp at the environment, reaching farther and farther out.

Increases maximum Fog Cloud size by 2 meters.

addons.name: Potent Extract
addons.description:
One drop is enough to change the consistency of this strange elixir.

Increases the Fog Cloud's opacity by 5%.Decreases the Fog Cloud's duration by 50%.Decreases the Fog Cloud's size by 25%.

addons.name: Reactive Compound
addons.description:
Pressure builds within the vial. Its contents beg for release.

Decreases the Fog Cloud's expansion time by 1 second.

addons.name: Oily Sap
addons.description:
The emerging fog clings to the air, overwhelming the senses for even longer.

Increases Fog Cloud duration by 2 seconds.

addons.name: BFFs
addons.description:
An unnaturally cold silver necklace split into four, one for each best friend.

Earn tokens for hitting Survivors during Feral Frenzy:Second chained hit: 2 tokensThird chained hit: 3 tokensFourth chained hit: 4 tokensFifth chained hit: 5 tokens

Once the gates are powered, if 15 or more tokens have been collected, gain 6% Haste when not using Feral Frenzy.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Defaced Smiley Pin
addons.description:
A once friendly-looking bright yellow button of a defaced smiley. A signature icon of The Legion.

Survivors who self-mend a Deep Wound from Feral Frenzy are inflicted with Mangled for 60 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Etched Ruler
addons.description:
A wooden ruler deeply etched with the names of enemies.

Survivors hit by a Feral Slash are inflicted with Oblivious for 60 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Filthy Blade
addons.description:
This blade is stained with foul spots of blood and grime that make injuries particularly difficult to mend.

Increases time required for Survivors to mend by 4 seconds.

addons.name: Frank's Mix Tape
addons.description:
Never go on a kill mission without your tunes. A track list of massive distortion and loud percussion that stabs at your eardrums.

While using Feral Frenzy:Damaging generators is 20% faster.Breaking walls is 30% faster.The Power gauge pauses while damaging a generator or breaking a wall.

addons.name: Friendship Bracelet
addons.description:
A wide gray and red braided rope bracelet. The inscription "F J S J" can be seen, crudely written in bold black ink.

Increases duration of lunges during Feral Frenzy by 0.3 seconds.

addons.name: Fuming Mix Tape
addons.description:
Dark beats, violent shreds and unfathomable sounds from another world fill the mind with a vibrating sixth sense.

While using Feral Frenzy:The repair progress of generators can be determined by the intensity of their auras.Generators not being worked on regress.

addons.name: Iridescent Button
addons.description:
A glass-like button molded from The Fog that captures The Legion’s likeness. The surface is warm and reverberating with The Entity's power.

During Feral Frenzy, any pallets you vault are immediately broken.

addons.name: Joey's Mix Tape
addons.description:
A mix of bangin' tracks and slammin' beats for when life's a bitch.

Survivors who self-mend a Deep Wound from Feral Frenzy are inflicted with Hemorrhage until fully healed.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Julie's Mix Tape
addons.description: A dark mix tape made out from mainly power ballads and gloomy rock.If The Legion is stunned while in Feral Frenzy, the power gauge refills once the duration of the stun ends.

addons.name: Mischief List
addons.description:
A list of mischievous missions to accomplish; memento of brighter days.

Increases the duration of Feral Frenzy by 1 seconds.

addons.name: Mural Sketch
addons.description:
A rough sketch of The Legion mural torn from a notebook.

Increases speed bonus per hit during Feral Frenzy to 0.32 m/s.

addons.name: Stylish Sunglasses
addons.description:
Oval-shaped sunglasses that exude poise and cool. Their color tinted lenses add an understated appeal.

Shows the auras of Survivors who are mending within a 24-meter radius.

addons.name: Never-Sleep Pills
addons.description:
Highly caffeinated tablets to make you extra sharp for exams or other draining activities.

The Legion's base move speed during Feral Frenzy is 4.6 m/s.Increases the duration of Feral Frenzy by 10 seconds.Gain 100 to 500 bonus Bloodpoints for each successive hit on a Survivor during Feral Frenzy.

addons.name: Scratched Ruler
addons.description:
A wooden ruler deeply scratched with hash marks.

Decreases Feral Frenzy recharge time by 5 seconds.

addons.name: Smiley Face Pin
addons.description:
A friendly-looking bright yellow button used as a sarcastic statement.

Survivors who self-mend a Deep Wound from Feral Frenzy are inflicted with Blindness for 60 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Stab Wounds Study
addons.description:
A printed medical article stolen from Ormond's public library vulgarizing a study on lesions and stab wounds.

The auras of Survivors who self-mend a Deep Wound from Feral Frenzy are shown for 4 seconds afterward.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

addons.name: Stolen Sketch Book
addons.description:
A sketch book with imaginative and evocative, if not slightly bizarre, sketches.

During Feral Frenzy, from the second chained hit onward, hit survivors drop their item.

addons.name: Susie's Mix Tape
addons.description: A thrilling mix tape with energizing songs and intricate guitar riffs.Increases Killer Instinct detection range by 20 meters.

addons.name: The Legion Pin
addons.description:
A handmade button with the face of The Legion. To use exclusively on intimidation dares.

Survivors who self-mend a Deep Wound from Feral Frenzy are inflicted with Broken for 60 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Robin Feather
addons.description:
A warm orange feather, soft to the touch.

Decreases bottle throw cooldown by 40%.

addons.name: Party Bottle
addons.description:
Be the life of the party!

Party Bottles emit confetti when they break, in addition to their usual gas effect.Hitting a Survivor directly with a Party Bottle interrupts actions as usual, and awards 100 Devious Bloodpoints.

addons.name: Smelly Inner Soles
addons.description:
A moldy inner sole which gives much comfort to tired feet.

Increases movement speed while reloading bottles by 15%.

addons.name: Fingerless Parade Gloves
addons.description:
Part of the standard Clown apparel; the cut fingers allow for dexterous manipulations.

Increases bottle throw speed by 25%.Decreases bottle throw angle by 15 degrees.

addons.name: Thick Cork Stopper
addons.description:
A sturdy cork, fitting The Afterpiece Tonic bottles perfectly.

Decreases reload time by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Solvent Jug
addons.description:
A volatile chemical compound that irritates the respiratory tract, but increases absorption of The Afterpiece Antidote.

Increases duration of Invigoration by 1 second.

addons.name: Kerosene Can
addons.description:
A thin and clear combustible liquid which numbs the mind when inhaled.

Intoxication inflicts Blindness for 30 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Sticky Soda Bottle
addons.description:
It's sugary sweet, with only a little blood on the label.

Increases Invigoration by 2%.

addons.name: Starling Feather
addons.description:
A black feather with an emerald sheen, very soft to the touch.

Decreases bottle throw cooldown by 50%.

addons.name: VHS Porn
addons.description:
An all time classic. You won't see things quite the same again.

Increases the size and spread of Afterpiece Tonic gas clouds by 10%.

addons.name: Spirit of Hartshorn
addons.description:
A pungent chemical compound consisting of ammonia. One whiff is enough to jolt even the most sluggish of minds.

Increases the size and spread of Afterpiece Antidote gas clouds by 20%.

addons.name: Sulfuric Acid Vial
addons.description:
An odorless syrupy liquid which is highly corrosive.

Intoxication inflicts Mangled on injured Survivors for 70 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Flask of Bleach
addons.description:
A potent chemical which causes irritation, burn and lungs damage.

Increases the Hindered penalty from Intoxication by an additional 2%.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Bottle of Chloroform
addons.description:
A sweet-smelling organic compound with strong anesthetic capabilities.

Increases the size and spread of Afterpiece Tonic gas clouds by 20%.

addons.name: Garish Makeup Kit
addons.description:
Some for the face and some for the Antidote. The unknown compound intensifies the Antidote's effects.

Increases the duration of Invigoration by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Cheap Gin Bottle
addons.description:
When the night was rough and the day is rougher, a little hair of the dog will give you a boost.

Increases Invigoration by 3%.

addons.name: Ether 15 vol%
addons.description:
A highly volatile organic compound, toxic at this concentration.

Increases the duration of Intoxication by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Cigar Box
addons.description:
A grim and incomplete collection of fingers. Fills The Clown with longing and focuses his chemical crafting abilities.

While The Clown or a Survivor is Invigorated, they see all other Survivor and Killer auras within 6 meters.

addons.name: Tattoo's Middle Finger
addons.description:
The prized middle finger of a large tattooed man. Has a faint taste of machinery oil.

Auras of Intoxicated or Invigorated Survivors are revealed to you for 6 seconds.

addons.name: @#Addon_GasBomb_19a_NAME
addons.description: @#Addon_GasBomb_19a_DESC

addons.name: Redhead's Pinky Finger
addons.description:
The prized pinky of a redhead. Faintly fragrant. Tastes of potpourri and varnish.

Direct hits by a bottle of Afterpiece Tonic inflict Exposed until Intoxication ends.Sets maximum number of carried bottles to 1.

Exposed Survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured.

addons.name: @#Addon_GasBomb_20a_NAME
addons.description: @#Addon_GasBomb_20a_DESC

addons.name: @#Addon_GasBomb_20b_NAME
addons.description: @#Addon_GasBomb_20b_DESC

addons.name: Cheap Cologne
addons.description:
Dollar store cologne with a pungent scent of rubbing alcohol. Worn by Ghost Face to make his presence known. Reserved for impromptu visits.

Increases Marked duration by 10 seconds.

addons.name: Chewed Pen
addons.description:
Blue pen with a chewed cap that holds traces of Danny’s DNA. Incriminating evidence that was never found.

Survivors that are in the dying state take 3 seconds to reveal The Ghost Face.

addons.name: Driver's License
addons.description:
A driver’s license revealing Olsen’s true identity: Danny Johnson.

When Marking a Survivor repairing a generator, the generator explodes and loses 20% progress.The affected generator becomes blocked for 15 seconds.When Marking multiple Survivors at the same time, the loss of progress only applies once.

addons.name: Drop-Leg Knife Sheath
addons.description:
Sheath allowing a full motion range: ideal to inflict quick and powerful wounds while moving freely. Stolen from a patrol officer the night Danny left Philadelphia.

The Ghost Face gains 10% movement speed for 5 seconds after Marking a Survivor.

addons.name: Headline Cutouts
addons.description:
Cutouts of articles covering unsolved murder cases from Utah to Pennsylvania. While Ghost Face only authored some of the headlines, he committed all the murders.

Compiling your success makes you proud and boosts your confidence.

Increases movement speed while stalking by 40%.

addons.name: Knife Belt Clip
addons.description:
Perfect belt clip to scout carry your blade discreetly. No one knows what you’re planning to do tonight.

Reduces the Terror Radius by 12 meters while crouching.

addons.name: Lasting Perfume
addons.description:
An overpowering musky fragrance worn by Ghost Face to announce his presence. Reserved for victims he planned to write about.

Survivors that are on a hook take 3 seconds to reveal The Ghost Face.

addons.name: Leather Knife Sheath
addons.description:
Quiet and flexible sheath to carry your blade. Movement is easier when things are fastened into place.

Increases crouched movement speed by 10%.

addons.name: Marked Map
addons.description:
The annotated map of Northern Roseville, Florida. Each X represents a victim of The Ghost Face. Mapping out your targets allows you to roam the streets undetected.

Increases duration of Killer Instinct after being revealed by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Night Vision Monocular
addons.description:
Night vision lens enabling sharp photos even when shrouded in darkness. Ideal for discreet, impromptu visits late at night.

A Survivor that reveals The Ghost Face is inflicted with Exhausted for 10 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Olsen's Address Book
addons.description:
Filled in blunt, blue crabbed writing. All the Roseville murder victims are listed there, along with their phone number and address.

Survivors that are Marked reveal their auras for 5 seconds when performing rushed actions.

addons.name: Olsen’s Journal
addons.description:
A spiral notebook filled with stained, handwritten entries. The journal details different equipment used to stalk victims.

A Survivor that is Marked is inflicted with Oblivious until the Mark expires.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Olsen’s Wallet
addons.description:
Olsen’s wallet holds thirty dollars in cash, a video club membership card, and a folded picture of Olsen’s first Roseville victim. Carrying incriminating evidence boosts your excitement and resolve.

Breaking a pallet or wall immediately recharges Night Shroud.

addons.name: Outdoor Security Camera
addons.description:
A small surveillance camera that filmed Ghost Face breaking into a house on Belleview Road in Northern Roseville. The camera was positioned at the perfect angle to catch a glimpse of Ghost Face without providing any real clues to the police.

The auras of all Survivors are revealed for 7 seconds when a Marked Survivor is put into the dying state.

addons.name: “Philly”
addons.description:
Stolen camera from a victim of Olsen’s in Philadelphia, where he worked before. The film inside captured his last night in the city.

Decreases time required to Mark a Survivor by 10%.

addons.name: Cinch Straps
addons.description:
Black straps that keep everything in place while on the prowl.

Night Shroud remains active after a failed basic attack.

addons.name: Telephoto Lens
addons.description:
A manual focus lens to take pictures from afar without being noticed.

A Survivor that reveals The Ghost Face is inflicted with Oblivious for 60 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: “Ghost Face Caught on Tape”
addons.description:
Tape obtained by Olsen to write an article that terrorized Roseville.

Instantly recharges Night Shroud after a successful basic attack that puts a Survivor into the dying state.

addons.name: Victim’s Detailed Routine
addons.description:
A ripped page outlining the weekly routine of Olsen's first victim in Roseville. Compiling your victim's habits allows you to anticipate and counter their next move.

After being Marked, Survivors are inflicted with Exhausted for 5 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Walleye's Matchbook
addons.description:
A sheet of matches from Walleye's, a small bar in Northern Roseville. A victim’s phone number is scribbled in blue. One of the incriminating pieces of evidence found.

Decreases Night Shroud recovery time by 3 seconds.

addons.name: Barbed Wire
addons.description:
Pliable American made steel lined with sharp barbs. Despite its simplicity, Caleb found it could be wrapped around a spear to increase its viciousness.

Increases Survivor mend time by 3.5 seconds.

addons.name: Bayshore’s Cigar
addons.description:
A quality cigar, plucked from the jacket of Caleb’s boss while he wailed over the spear lodged in his abdomen.

Decreases the stun duration when Survivors break free by 0.75 second.

addons.name: Bayshore’s Gold Tooth
addons.description:
A golden tooth torn from Henry Bayshore as he screamed for mercy, hours before he was finished off.

Increases The Redeemer's reeling speed by 5%.

addons.name: Chewing Tobacco
addons.description:
A can of clipped and sweetened tobacco leaves lifted from a gutted body in Glenvale. Stimulates the nervous system.

Decreases the stun duration when Survivors break free by 0.25 seconds.

addons.name: Gold Creek Whiskey
addons.description:
Warm comfort in a bottle that quelled Caleb’s anger and slowed his step.

Decreases Terror Radius by 8 meters while aiming down The Redeemer's sights.

addons.name: Hellshire Iron
addons.description:
The Hellshire Gang’s branding iron. Despite folklore, it never made its mark on new initiates, instead having been used to brand particularly quarrelsome bounties.

When a Survivor is speared, gain Undetectable. The effect persists for 10 seconds after the Survivor is no longer speared.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius and Red Stain.

addons.name: Honey Locust Thorns
addons.description:
Angered with a bounty who fled twice before, Caleb twisted thorn branches onto a spear and let it loose.

Breaking free from the spear inflicts Mangled for 70 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Iridescent Coin
addons.description:
A glass-like coin molded from The Fog itself. Payment to the bounty hunter for services rendered.

Survivors speared from at least 12 meters away are inflicted with Exposed for as long as they remain speared.

Exposed survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured.

addons.name: Jaw Smasher
addons.description:
The bullet that ripped through Caleb’s jaw during a frenzied shootout. It brings back a burning desire for revenge.

Increases movement speed by 1.5% while aiming down The Redeemer's sights.

addons.name: Marshal's Badge
addons.description:
A silver badge taken from the corpse of a lawman in Arizona Territory who interfered with the Hellshire Gang’s bounties.

Decreases Terror Radius by 4 meters while aiming down The Redeemer's sights.

addons.name: Modified Ammo Belt
addons.description:
An old ammo belt Caleb altered for his specialized weaponry. Still holds the fine red dirt of the Arizona Territory desert.

Decreases The Redeemer's reload time by 0.25 seconds.

addons.name: Poison Oak Leaves
addons.description:
An ordinary looking plant, Caleb found that spears coated in its oil caused unbearable blistering around wounds.

Increases Survivor mend time by 1.5 seconds.

addons.name: Prison Chain
addons.description:
A thick, heavy chain that once held a steel ball and latched to Caleb’s ankle. It’s been repurposed to hook onto a spear.

Increases time required for a Survivor to break free from a spear by 10%.

addons.name: Rickety Chain
addons.description:
Weak steel links first used on Caleb's prototype Speargun. Despite the chain's failings, it holds sentimental value.

Grants 50% bonus Bloodpoints for Speared score events.Survivors break free 33% faster.

addons.name: Rusted Spike
addons.description:
A railroad spike that Caleb fastened to the front of the Speargun during a moment of morbid curiosity. The dull tip prevents it from cleanly piercing its target.

Hitting a Survivor with The Redeemer while they are being reeled in inflicts Mangled for 60 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Snake Oil
addons.description:
A tincture of oils and extracts purchased from a travelling salesman. Purported to cure all that ails you.

Increases The Redeemer's reeling speed by 2.5%.

addons.name: Spit Polish Rag
addons.description:
A grimy piece of burlap. Spit and elbow grease was enough to wipe down the speargun in the heat of a shootout.

Decreases The Redeemer's miss cooldown by 0.25 seconds.

addons.name: Tin Oil Can
addons.description:
A can holding a small amount of oil to reduce friction in machinery. Early models of the Speargun were notorious for jamming, and oil had to be readily available.

Decreases The Redeemer's miss cooldown by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Wanted Poster
addons.description:
The yellowed remains of a wanted poster for Mason Kelly. Kept Caleb focused on the hunt.

Increases movement speed by 3% while aiming down The Redeemer's sights.

addons.name: Warden’s Keys
addons.description:
The dull jangle of the keys evokes a furious memory within Caleb.

Decreases The Redeemer's reload time by 0.35 seconds.

addons.name: Amanita Toxin
addons.description:
A toxin applied to the Hatchets' blade. The Amanita mushrooms' toxin numbs the mind.

Hatchets inflict Blindness for 60 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Bandaged Haft
addons.description:
First-aid bandages securely rolled and attached to the Hatchets' haft.

Decreases Hatchet throw cooldown by 10%.

addons.name: Begrimed Head
addons.description:
These Hatchets' heads are stained with a foul substance that afflict anyone it touches with debilities.

Hit target suffers from the Mangled and Hemorrhage status effects for 80 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Yellowed Cloth
addons.description:
A simple scrap of material to tend to blisters and wipe the puss away.

Increases thrown hatchet speed by 10%.

addons.name: Coarse Stone
addons.description:
This stone is too coarse to do any good. A blade damaged by it inflicts awful open wounds.

Hitting a target increases the volume of their grunts of pain by 50% until healed.

addons.name: Deerskin Gloves
addons.description:
Cured leather gloves that protect the hands and give a sure grip.

Decreases time required to reload Hatchets at a locker by 20%.

addons.name: Weighted Head
addons.description:
An oddly weighted hatchet head, crafted to deliver a hard blow to its target. It requires a wielder with a strong arm.

Hatchets inflict Incapacitated for 10 seconds.

Incapacitated prevents Survivors from healing, repairing, sabotaging, cleansing, blessing, mending, or using items.

addons.name: Flower Babushka
addons.description:
A clean and colorful kerchief adorned with a flower pattern. This memory of a lost little one fills the Huntress with rage and focus.

Decreases time required to wind up a Hatchet throw by 10%.

addons.name: Glowing Concoction
addons.description:
An otherworldly concoction that faintly glows a foreboding light.

Reveals the auras of Survivors hit by Hatchets for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Infantry Belt
addons.description:
A sturdy utility belt pillaged from a soldier. He was quick in combat, but she was quicker.

Hatchet hits grant 3% Haste for 5 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Iridescent Head
addons.description:
A glass-like Hatchet head molded from The Fog Itself. The blade is warm and reverberating with The Entity's power.

Successful Hatchet hits immediately put healthy Survivors into the dying state.Sets maximum number of carried Hatchets to 1.

addons.name: Leather Loop
addons.description:
The right tool in the right hands is key to a successful hunt.

Hatchet hits grant 2% Haste for 5 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Manna Grass Braid
addons.description:
A circular decorative braid made from manna grass. This memory of a lost little one fills the Huntress with rage and focus.

Decreases time required to wind up a Hatchet throw by 5%.

addons.name: Oak Haft
addons.description:
A polished haft which allows for a quick and sly manipulation of the deadly tool.

Decreases Hatchet throw cooldown by 20%.

addons.name: Soldier's Puttee
addons.description:
A wrap taken from a dead soldier, it provides protection and support to the ankle and lower leg.

The Huntress moves 4.6 m/s when she has no Hatchets.

addons.name: Rusty Head
addons.description:
These Hatchets' heads are covered with crusty and volatile rust spots that makes injuries particularly difficult to heal.

Hatchets inflict Mangled for 70 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Shiny Pin
addons.description:
A copper pin defaced beyond recognition yet polished to a high sheen. Pillaged from a particularly difficult prey.

Increases The Huntress' movement speed by 5% while aiming or throwing a Hatchet.

addons.name: Venomous Concoction
addons.description:
A toxic concoction applied to the Hatchets' blade. The murky concoction is mainly composed of Berus snake venom which gives it fatiguing capabilities.

Hatchets inflict Exhausted for 5 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Wooden Fox
addons.description:
Roughly carved, this fox statuette is no more than a few inches. A reminder that stealth and cunning is as effective as raw power.

Grants Undetectable for 30 seconds after reloading.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Rose Root
addons.description:
Dried petals that relieve symptoms of fatigue and overexertion when brewed in a tea.

Increases thrown Hatchet speed by 20%.

addons.name: Filthy Slippers
addons.description:
Max sometimes struggled to hear his mother’s footfalls.

After maintaining a Chainsaw Sprint for 2 seconds, grants Undetectable until the Chainsaw Sprint ends.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Cat Figurine
addons.description:
A wooden figure that had caught young Victor's eye. He shrieked until his mother stole it from the market, nearly blowing their cover.

Displays the target location of a Pounce.

addons.name: Rusted Needle
addons.description:
A needle Madeleine used to sew up her children’s tattered clothes.

Crushing Victor when attached inflicts Hemorrhage until healed.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Sewer Sludge
addons.description:
A disgusting, sticky mixture that covered the Deshayes during an escape attempt through the city sewers.

Increases time to crush Victor when attached by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Madeleine’s Scarf
addons.description:
A cloth Madeleine wore shortly before her death. The Twins kept it as a memento.

Increases Victor's movement speed by 0.3 m/s.

addons.name: Stale Biscuit
addons.description:
A hard, unleavened biscuit that Madeleine stole from a town’s market. It wasn’t much, but it was better than most meals.

Decreases Pounce cooldown by 0.4 seconds.

addons.name: Weighty Rattle
addons.description:
A shoddily carved rattle that Victor cried over until his mother stole it for him. It’s entirely too heavy to be trusted to a child.

Crushing Victor when attached inflicts Broken for 20 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Forest Stew
addons.description:
A stew of foraged vegetables mixed with moss and bark to create a false sense of fullness.

Increases Victor's movement speed by 0.6 m/s.

addons.name: Spinning Top
addons.description:
A wooden top shared between The Twins, though Victor wanted it for his own. He learned he could get what he wanted if he clung tightly and screamed.

Victor's Pounce causes Survivors to drop their carried Survivor items.

addons.name: Drop of Perfume
addons.description:
One of the few luxuries Madeleine escaped her past life with. It has a pleasant, disarming scent.

Survivors in Victor's alert range while he is dormant are inflicted with Oblivious.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Victor’s Soldier
addons.description:
A toy soldier Victor clung to when scared. Something about it evoked jealousy in Charlotte.

Crushing Victor while he is dormant reveals the Survivor's aura for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Silencing Cloth
addons.description:
A coarse strip of cloth that a five-year-old Charlotte would put in her mouth. Stopped her from screaming when witch hunters were nearby.

Charlotte gains Undetectable for 20 seconds after waking from her dormant state.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Tiny Fingernail
addons.description:
Charlotte had many ways to mourn Victor’s death. As the fingernails loosened from his rotting hands, she took one in remembrance.

Decreases Victor's Unbind time by 33%.

addons.name: Iridescent Pendant
addons.description:
A glass-like pendant molded from The Fog itself. There’s a portrait of Madeleine Deshayes upon it, though something about her depiction seems unsettling.

Crushing Victor while he is dormant inflicts Exposed for 45 seconds.

Exposed Survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured.

addons.name: Soured Milk
addons.description:
A metal bottle filled with milk that has since soured. Loud as Victor could be, he quieted down when presented with his meal.

Increases Victor's alert range by 2 meters.

addons.name: Toy Sword
addons.description:
A miniscule toy sword, only a few inches long. Holding it brought out a violent enthusiasm in Victor.

Decreases Pounce charge time by 10%.

addons.name: Cat’s Eye
addons.description:
An eyeball that belonged to a cat eaten by the starving Deshayes’ family. Victor hid it from his mother, using it as a toy.

Victor becomes silent while Pounce is fully charged.

addons.name: Madeleine’s Glove
addons.description:
A glove once owned by The Twins’ mother. During desperate times, it was held over Victor’s mouth to keep him from making a peep.

Increases Victor's alert range by 4 meters.

addons.name: Bloody Black Hood
addons.description:
A hood from one of the men that hunted Charlotte. Soon, he became the prey.

Decreases Charlotte's waking time by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Ceremonial Candelabrum
addons.description:
The candelabrum that Victor tipped over, causing his captors to burn. A symbol of his tenacity.

Increases time to crush Victor when he is dormant by 0.2 seconds.

addons.name: Baby Teeth
addons.description:
Two teeth that Victor lost long ago. They’re unusually sharp.

Crushing Victor when attached inflicts Blindness for 30 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Damaged Syringe
addons.description: Medical equipment that fared poorly during the chaos that overwhelmed Raccoon City.Increases time it takes Survivors to use a Vaccine by 5 seconds.

addons.name: Tyrant Gore
addons.description: A damaged sample from a T-002 Tyrant that died in combat. There are signs of severe burns.Increases mutation rate when destroying zombies with Tentacle Strike by 75%.Decreases zombie respawn time by 7.5 seconds.

addons.name: Serotonin Injector
addons.description:
A hormone that slightly relaxes the user for when stealth is required.Grants Undetectable for 15 seconds when a zombie is destroyed.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: T-Virus Sample
addons.description: A sample of the T-Virus developed by Umbrella Corporation, it causes extreme mutations and brain damage in its subjects.Increases mutation rate when destroying zombies with Tentacle Strike by 100%.

addons.name: Plant 43 Vines
addons.description: The tangled remnants of a plant infected with the T-Virus, it killed one of the researchers who developed it.Increases time required for Survivors to open Supply Cases by 4 seconds.

addons.name: Licker Tongue
addons.description:
A sticky prehensile tongue that easily wraps around anything it touches.Survivors are Hindered for an extra 1 second after being Contaminated.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: NE-α Parasite
addons.description:
A parasite used in the development of Nemesis T-Types, it’s capable of hijacking its host’s brain.Becoming Contaminated inflicts Oblivious for 60 seconds, or until the Survivor receives a Vaccine.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Jill’s Sandwich
addons.description: It’s tragically squished and dripping with blood from a recent battle. Despite that, it has a delicious aroma that can’t be missed.Reveals a Survivor's aura for 12 seconds after they unlock a Supply Case.

addons.name: Broken Recovery Coin
addons.description: A coin depicting a bird framed by a laurel wreath. It’s broken in half.Removes 1 Supply Case from the trial.

addons.name: Depleted Ink Ribbon
addons.description: Who will save them now? There’s something about this ink ribbon being dry that energizes zombies.Decreases zombie respawn time by 5 seconds.Increases zombie movement speed by 50%.Any zombies destroyed after all generators are repaired will respawn in an exit area.

addons.name: Shattered S.T.A.R.S. Badge
addons.description: A symbol of hope for Raccoon City, utterly destroyed.Increases Zombie movement speed by 150% for 60 seconds after a generator is repaired.

addons.name: Brian’s Intestine
addons.description: The small intestine of Brian Irons, chief of the RPD. It's an appetizing sight for zombies.Increases zombie movement speed by 25%.

addons.name: Iridescent Umbrella Badge
addons.description:
A glass-like badge molded from The Fog itself. It represents a corporation that pushed far beyond ethical and humane science.Survivors are inflicted with Exposed for 60 seconds when using a Vaccine.

Exposed Survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured.

addons.name: Visitor Wristband
addons.description: An electronic Umbrella wristband for visitors to the facility. It also doubles as a tracking device.Increases zombie detection range by 2 meters and field of view by 10 degrees.

addons.name: S.T.A.R.S. Field Combat Manual
addons.description: A manual of compiled S.T.A.R.S. close-range combat knowledge. Edited by Chris Redfield.Zombies’ auras turn yellow for 6 seconds after hitting a Survivor.

addons.name: Marvin’s Blood
addons.description: The contaminated blood of a Raccoon City police officer.Increases mutation rate when hitting Survivors with Tentacle Strike by 16% for uncontaminated Survivors and by 50% for contaminated Survivors.

addons.name: Adrenaline Injector
addons.description: A hormone that heightens senses and prepares the body to fight.Increases length of Killer Instinct when Survivors use a Vaccine by 3 seconds.

addons.name: Mikhail’s Eye
addons.description: While little was left of Mikhail, his left eyeball survived the blast that killed him. It remains a tasty treat for zombies.Increases zombie movement speed by 35%.

addons.name: Zombie Heart
addons.description: The heart of an eviscerated zombie. It’s considered hazardous waste as it’s certainly teeming with viruses.Increases mutation rate when destroying zombies with Tentacle Strike by 75%.

addons.name: Admin Wristband
addons.description: An electronic Umbrella wristband for administrators of the facility. While allowing access to secure areas, it also doubles as a tracking device.Increases zombie detection range by 4 meters and field of view by 18 degrees.

addons.name: Bent Nail
addons.description:
A simple nail that cut deep into Larry Cotton’s hand. Though the damage was superficial, it set into motion a horrifying set of events.

Gain 100% bonus Bloodpoints when binding a Survivor with a possessed chain.When hitting a Survivor with a possessed chain, only 1 additional chain will spawn.

addons.name: Lively Crickets
addons.description:
Insects which scarcely avoided being eaten by a mysterious drifter.

Increases turn rate of possessed chains by 10%.

addons.name: Burning Candle
addons.description:
A candle lit by Frank Cotton during a fatal summoning ceremony.

Decreases the time for Chain Hunts to activate by 3 seconds.

addons.name: Leather Strip
addons.description:
Leather strips torn from a cenobite’s uniform, allowing for the mutilation of exposed flesh.

Decreases Summons of Pain’s cooldown time after possessing a chain by 3%.

addons.name: Wriggling Maggots
addons.description:
Larvae that poured from the mouth of a corpse hidden in the Cotton household.

Increases turn rate of possessed chains by 15%.

addons.name: Spoiled Meal
addons.description:
A pile of mold, feasted on by a cockroach. Perhaps a sign of Frank Cotton’s mysterious disappearance...

Increases the possessed chain’s maximum travel distance by 2 meters.

addons.name: Skewered Rat
addons.description:
A crude solution for the Cotton home’s rat problem.

Decreases Summons of Pain’s cooldown time after possessing a chain by 9%.

addons.name: Flickering Television
addons.description:
A television that acted strangely upon the arrival of the cenobites.

Increases the maximum casting range of the gateway by 4 meters.

addons.name: Liquified Gore
addons.description:
The result of summoning the cenobites. There’s no telling what part of the human body this belonged to.

Increases the time it takes Survivors to solve the Lament Configuration by 1 second.

addons.name: Larry’s Blood
addons.description:
The blood of Larry Cotton, which partially resurrected his brother Frank.

Increases the possessed chain's maximum travel distance by 4 meters.

addons.name: Torture Pillar
addons.description:
A dangling slab covered in the gore of past victims.

Decreases the time for Chain Hunts to activate by 6 seconds.

addons.name: Frank’s Heart
addons.description:
The beating heart of Frank, given life from his brother’s blood.

Increases the maximum casting range of the gateway by 8 meters.

addons.name: Larry’s Remains
addons.description:
The skeletal remains of Larry Cotton, covered in a thick, sticky layer of blood.

Increases the time it takes Survivors to solve the Lament Configuration by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Slice of Frank
addons.description:
A slab of Frank’s face after his torture at the hand of the cenobites.

Survivors carrying the Lament Configuration are inflicted with Exhausted.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Greasy Black Lens
addons.description:
A lens from the sunglasses of an obese cenobite whose fleshy rolls droop down his face and neck.

Survivors hit by a possessed chain are revealed for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Original Pain
addons.description:
The first pin pushed into Pinhead’s skull. Such pleasure and pain.

When a Survivor breaks free from a possessed chain, reveal their aura for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Impaling Wire
addons.description:
A wire that pierces the cheeks of a cenobite, while revealing the gaping wound on her neck.

When a Survivor uses the environment to break a chain, an additional chain will target them.

addons.name: Chatterer’s Tooth
addons.description:
A fragment from a cenobite whose mouth chatters endlessly. This tooth, having broken from his jaw, is finally silent.

Reveal the Lament Configuration.Picking up the Lament Configuration deactivates Chain Hunts.Gain the Undetectable status effect for 25 seconds after picking up the Lament Configuration.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius and Red Stain.

addons.name: Engineer’s Fang
addons.description:
A sharp tooth from the maw of a fleshy, scorpion-like creature, known to accompany cenobites on their grim undertakings.

Possessed chains injure healthy Survivors, but do not bind them or spawn additional chains.Increases the time to close the gateway after hitting a healthy Survivor with a possessed chain by 50%.When hitting an injured Survivor with a possessed chain, only 1 additional chain will spawn.

addons.name: Iridescent Lament Configuration
addons.description:
A glass-like puzzle box molded from The Fog itself. This replica differs from the original, providing altogether new powers.

When a Chain Hunt is inactive, Survivors beyond 24 meters of the Lament Configuration cannot see its aura.

addons.name: Oil Paints
addons.description:
There's little left but a few globs of black and gray, yet Carmina could paint an expansive landscape with them.

Increases the Dire Crow's Killer Instinct detection range by 1.5 meters.

Killer Instinct intermittently reveals the location of Survivors.

addons.name: Vibrant Obituary
addons.description:
Scrap newspaper, speckled with bright, eye-catching paint. It seems tragedy is a daily thing.

Increases the length of time a Dire Crow's Killer Instinct reveals Survivors by 3 seconds.

Killer Instinct intermittently reveals the location of Survivors.

addons.name: Thick Tar
addons.description:
Sticky, viscous sludge that Carmina used for an experimental piece. Once it sticks to skin, it's nearly impossible to get off.

Increases the time for Survivors to repel a Dire Crow swarm by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Choclo Corn
addons.description:
A type of corn common in South America. A few kernels are reason enough for a crow to stop for a snack.

Increases the time Dire Crows stay idle for before disintegrating by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Automatic Drawing
addons.description:
An experimental drawing Carmina made without conscious planning. Do not think—act.

Decreases Birds of Torment cooldown time by 1.5 seconds after a Dire Crow disintegrates from inactivity.

addons.name: Festering Carrion
addons.description:
A stomach-churning pile of meat and guts, yet it attracts hungry crows craving a bite.

Decreases Birds of Torment cooldown time by 0.5 seconds after a Dire Crow takes flight.

addons.name: Velvet Fabric
addons.description:
A striking red fabric Carmina used on an art project. Its brightness contrasted against black feathers.

When a Survivor attempts to repel a Dire Crow swarm, the swarm's aura remains visible for an additional 1.5 seconds.

addons.name: Still Life Crow
addons.description:
An ink drawing of a dead crow. Carmina's sadness over its death can be felt with each dark line.

Increases the time Dire Crows stay idle before disintegrating by 4 seconds.

addons.name: Untitled Agony
addons.description:
A canvas that was targeted with swipes and thrashes of black paint following Matias' death. It radiates with heavy, crippling sorrow.When Dire Crows swarm a Survivor, it afflicts them with a 15% Hindered status effect for 1.5 seconds.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Charcoal Stick
addons.description:
A stick of charcoal that conceals anything it rubs over.

The Dire Crow's aura is no longer visible when in flight.The Dire Crow's aura is visible for 0.5 seconds when summoned.

addons.name: Darkest Ink
addons.description:
An unnatural ink, so wretched and dark that it seems to pull in light around it.

When Dire Crows swarm a Survivor, it afflicts them with the Blindness status effect. The effect persists for 15 seconds after Dire Crows are repelled from a Survivor.

Blindness prevents survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: O Grief, O Lover
addons.description:
An abstract ink drawing that Carmina drew before walking to the Death Leap.

When Dire Crows swarm a Survivor, it afflicts them with the Exhausted status effect.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Thorny Nest
addons.description:
A nest that remained empty near Carmina's home. There are sharp thorns embedded in it.

Survivors damaged by a Dire Crow are afflicted with the Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 70 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Silver Bell
addons.description:
A shiny trinket that a crow took a liking to. The clinking of the bell was a distraction to all but Carmina.

When Dire Crows swarm a Survivor it afflicts them with the Oblivious status effect.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing and being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Matias' Baby Shoes
addons.description:
A grieving reminder to Carmina that Matias would be with her, always watching.

Survivors within 5 meters of an idle Dire Crow have their auras revealed for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Severed Tongue
addons.description:
Carmina's tongue, cut from her mouth shortly before her death. The sight instills rage not just in her, but in her crows.

Decreases the length of time The Artist's movement slows when Dire Crows take flight by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Garden of Rot
addons.description:
A nude self-portrait in which Carmina depicts a rotting darkness growing outwards from within.

When a Survivor affected by Dire Crows completes the repel action, they are afflicted by the Exposed status effect for 4 seconds.

Exposed Survivors are downed by basic attacks, even if uninjured.

addons.name: Ink Egg
addons.description:
An unusual egg that seems to be nothing but a ball of semi-solid ink.

Increases the maximum capacity of Dire Crows by 1.Decreases the time Dire Crows stay idle before disintegrating by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Severed Hands
addons.description:
Carmina's severed hands, cut from her arms shortly before her death. The sight brings sheer fury to her and her protectors.

Any Survivors within 3 meters of a Survivor being swarmed by Dire Crows will also be swarmed.

addons.name: Iridescent Feather
addons.description:
A glass-like feather molded from The Fog itself. Simple as it may be, it's a symbol of those who watch over Carmina.

The Artist gains the Undetectable status effect when Birds of Torment is in cooldown and she holds no Dire Crows.Decreases the maximum capacity of Dire Crows by 1.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Wooden Plank
addons.description:
A wooden plank torn from the stage where Otto Stamper sacrificed a meddling journalist.

Increases the amount Nightfall charges when a Survivor is hooked by 25%.

addons.name: Caffeine Tablets
addons.description:
Stamper’s followers were told not to sleep, or they would bring the wrath of Druanee upon them. Towards the end, he brought in drugs from the mainland.

Auras of locked lockers are visible in yellow while charging The Gloaming and Teleporting.

addons.name: Mortar and Pestle
addons.description:
Disconnected from the world and modern medicine, Stamper's followers originally had to make do with the flora local to the island.

The Dredge will emerge from its Remnant facing the same direction as when Teleport is activated instead of the direction facing when the Remnant was placed.

addons.name: Follower’s Cowl
addons.description:
They believed the cowls proved their enlightenment, but they merely kept them in darkness.

Teleporting to the Remnant will activate Killer Instinct even when not in Nightfall.

addons.name: Burnt Letters
addons.description:
Some followers tried to write letters home. Stamper ensured that nobody would have contact with the outside world.

Increases the amount Nightfall charges when injuring a Survivor by 25%.

addons.name: Air Freshener
addons.description:
After her parents were found, this was in the bag of belongings the police returned. Haddie doesn’t know why she keeps it.

Adds 1 additional Power Token for Teleporting.

addons.name: Haddie’s Calendar
addons.description:
She planned to cross out each day until her parents took her to India, but when tragedy struck, she abandoned her calendar.

Decreases the time to exit a locked locker by 0.4 seconds.

addons.name: Fallen Shingle
addons.description:
After the Ottomarians were subsumed by The Dredge, the mansion fell into disrepair.

Using Reign of Darkness increases Nightfall charge speed by an additional 15% per second.

addons.name: Malthinker’s Skull
addons.description:
Those who brought negativity to the commune would mysteriously disappear from time to time. Their remains were never found… until The Dredge brought them up.

Increases Nightfall charge speed by 25% while any Survivor is injured.

addons.name: Worry Stone
addons.description:
While the Ottomarians were told to think only positive thoughts, some kept these stones in their pockets to rub when negative thoughts arose.

Reveals the aura of a Survivor for 6 seconds when they lock a locker.

addons.name: Ottomarian Writing
addons.description:
The words of Otto Stamper were the only words available for his followers to read, decrying malthink and malspeak.

Decreases Teleport cooldown by 2 seconds while not in Nightfall.

addons.name: Broken Doll
addons.description:
Followers brought their families to live in a utopia. None of them were spared.

Increases the duration of Nightfall by 20 seconds.

addons.name: War Helmet
addons.description:
While investigating an Overlap in the Alps, she found an abandoned war bunker. She took a helmet from it after the Overlap nearly took her.

Increases Killer Instinct duration by 1.5 seconds.

addons.name: Destroyed Pillow
addons.description:
While not allowed to sleep, leaders among the Ottomarians tore sleeping supplies to shreds to prevent malthinkers from sneaking off to nap.

Decreases Teleport cooldown by 2.5 seconds during Nightfall.

addons.name: Tilling Blade
addons.description:
The island was self-sufficient, and followers tilled the tough soil to grow crops during the warm season.

When a Survivor is injured from full health during Nightfall, they are afflicted with the Blindness, Hemorrhage, and Mangled status effects for 80 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Boat Key
addons.description:
Only one boat allowed people on and off the island, and the keys were hidden away to prevent deserters.

Increases Teleport speed by 16% while not in Nightfall.When the exit gates are powered, all active locks are instantly broken.

addons.name: Field Recorder
addons.description:
Haddie documented all of her forays near Overlaps, to prove not only to the world but herself what she saw and felt.

Nightfall is active at the start of the trial.Nightfall is automatically triggered when the last generator is repaired.Any Survivor that comes into contact with a Remnant is afflicted with the Exhausted status effect for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Lavalier Microphone
addons.description:
She kept a lav mic nearby, allowing her to record her innermost feelings when under great stress.

Survivor auras are revealed for 3 seconds when using the last Teleport token.When entering a locker using Teleport, other lockers within 6 meters of Survivors open and slam their doors.

addons.name: Sacrificial Knife
addons.description:
When a journalist attempted to warn the Ottomarians of his true task, he slit her throat as a warning to any dissenters.

Exiting a locker during Nightfall blocks all vault locations within 16 meters for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Iridescent Wooden Plank
addons.description:
Once the journalist’s blood stained the wooden boards of the stage, everything was set into motion for The Dredge’s arrival.

Survivors are afflicted with the Exposed status effect for the last 12 seconds of Nightfall.

Exposed Survivors are downed by basic attacks, even if uninjured.

addons.name: Jewel Beetle
addons.description:
A beautiful and valuable insect. While difficult to capture, it’s worth a pretty penny.

Decreases the Virulent Bound extension when grabbing a Survivor mid-Bound by 50%.Gain 100% bonus Bloodpoints for Virulent Bound score events.

addons.name: Green Herb
addons.description:
A common plant, usually known for its restorative properties.

Increases the rate of Infection when grabbing a Survivor during a Virulent Bound by 30%.

addons.name: Unicorn Medallion
addons.description:
An old medallion depicting a majestic unicorn. It was placed in storage for years.

Increases the initial Virulent Bound distance by 20%.Decreases the subsequent Virulent Bound distance by 20%.

addons.name: R.P.D. Shoulder Walkie
addons.description:
Without the ability to communicate, the cops of Raccoon City are isolated and don’t stand a chance.

Decreases the initial Virulent Bound distance by 20%.Increases the subsequent Virulent Bound distance by 20%.

addons.name: Loose Crank
addons.description: To the person whose only tool is a crank, the whole world looks like a crank-shaped hole.Increases movement speed between the first and second Virulent Bounds by 8%.

addons.name: Leather Gloves
addons.description: Gloves of a cold, calculating schemer. They impart an air of icy professionalism.Decreases the time to recharge Virulent Bound by 8%.

addons.name: Lion Medallion
addons.description: An old medallion depicting a brave lion. It was made when the Raccoon Police Station was still an art museum.Increases the distance at which Survivors are thrown by 30%.

addons.name: Chalice (Gold)
addons.description: A chalice of pure gold used to celebrate the summer solstice.Increases the Virulent Bound extension when grabbing a Survivor mid-Bound by 50%.

addons.name: Bullhorn
addons.description:
The commands screamed into this device riled up some and disoriented others.Survivors that use the First Aid Spray suffer from the Oblivious status effect for 30 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Portable Safe
addons.description:
A small container that requires a complicated combination to unlock.Survivors injured by Virulent Bound suffer from the Hemorrhage status effect until fully healed.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Red Herb
addons.description: Acts as a reagent that strengthens the effect of that with which it is combined.Increases the time it takes for Survivors to use a First Aid Spray by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Maiden Medallion
addons.description:
A medallion depicting a beautiful maiden. Its purpose was unknown for many years.When a Survivor becomes fully Infected, they suffer from the Blindness status effect for 60 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Video Conference Device
addons.description: Many intricate conspiracies were orchestrated on devices just like this one.Increases the Infection passive gain rate by 30%.

addons.name: Egg (Gold)
addons.description: A highly coveted foodstuff. The cash worth is second only to its regenerative effects.Increases the duration of the additional Virulent Bound window by 50%.

addons.name: Dark Sunglasses
addons.description:
Glasses enhanced with AR that grant the wearer an invaluable advantage on the battlefield.When a Survivor is fully infected with the Uroboros Infection, gain the Undetectable status effect for 20 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Helicopter Stick
addons.description: Debris from a helicopter crash. Few jobs are more dangerous than a helicopter pilot’s when Wesker is involved.When a Survivor uses a First Aid Spray, reveal their aura for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Uroboros Tendril
addons.description: The result of decades of Bio Organic Weapon research. It will not rest until it has swallowed the entire world.Increases movement speed while charging Virulent Bound by 5%.

addons.name: Uroboros Virus
addons.description: For some, the strength and resistance was worth the trade-off.When a Survivor reaches full infection, reveal their aura for 4 seconds.

addons.name: Lab Photo
addons.description: Wesker was as much a researcher as he was a guinea pig for Umbrella's bio-weapons.Destroy pallets and breakable walls when colliding while using Virulent Bound.Removes the ability to vault pallets while using Virulent Bound.

addons.name: Iridescent Uroboros Vial
addons.description:
The perfect bio-weapon. Decades of research have led to this.Survivors start the trial Infected with Uroboros.Survivors suffer from the Exposed status effect for 30 seconds when reaching maximum Infection.

Exposed Survivors will be downed by basic attacks even if uninjured.

addons.name: Gritty Lump
addons.description:
A rock-hard, dense loaf filled their stomachs on most days, giving them the energy to commit truly heinous acts.

Increases Guards' movement Speed while on Patrol by 9%.

addons.name: Map of the Realm
addons.description:
These unique leather maps were not easy to come by, but when they could not be purchased, they could be taken by force.

Increases the detection Range for Guards on Patrol by 2 meters.

addons.name: Tattered Tabard
addons.description:
Cloaked in heavy fabrics, neither human nor nature could stop them once they had their target.

Increases Patrol time for all Guards by 8 seconds.

addons.name: Pillaged Mead
addons.description:
Drinks taken from their victims tasted sweet, but such frivolities were often short-lived.

Decreases the amount of time it takes for a Guard to complete their Order action by 10%.

addons.name: Dried Horsemeat
addons.description:
Long campaigns often required restocking, and the steeds of fallen enemies were as good as any farm-fresh ration.

Increases the amount of time a Guard will Hunt a Survivor by 4 seconds.

addons.name: Battleaxe Head
addons.description:
Sander Rault was a tower of a man, terrifying in form and demeanor.

Decreases the cooldown after summoning The Carnifex by 20%.

addons.name: Treated Blade
addons.description:
Durkos Malecek stuck to the shadows, and was an efficient slaughterer.

Decreases the cooldown after summoning The Assassin by 20%.

addons.name: Cold Steel Manacles
addons.description:
Alejandro Santiago apprenticed as an armorer, and showed no remorse.

Decreases the cooldown after summoning The Jailer by 20%.

addons.name: Call To Arms
addons.description:
Posted across many towns, lords desperate to protect their riches posted for able-bodied mercenaries. None survived.

Increases the length of a Patrol Path by 4 meters, and, while creating the path, movement speed is increased by 7%.

addons.name: Sharpened Mount
addons.description:
To stand before the Standard of the Guardia Compagnia was to stand at the threshold between life and death.

Increases the time it takes for the Standard to spawn by 15%.

addons.name: Grim Iron Mask
addons.description:
No method of torture was too base for Guardia Compagnia. Pain and humiliation went hand-in-hand.

When a Survivor is Detected by a Guard, the Survivor suffers from Blindness for 75 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Broken Hilt
addons.description:
A fresh weapon is clean, even surgical; an attack with a broken one is malicious and desperate.

Guards inflict the Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 70 seconds when damaging a Survivor.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors.This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Ironworker’s Tongs
addons.description:
Vital for repairs between battles and a horrifying, gauging, tearing improvisational weapon.

When a Survivor escapes a Guard Hunt successfully, they suffer from the Oblivious status effect for 60 seconds.

Oblivious prevents survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Town Watch’s Torch
addons.description:
Upon breaching a village, the first thing they would extinguish was the torches, and with them, hope.

While a Guard is actively Hunting a Survivor, gain the Undetectable status effect.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Blacksmith’s Hammer
addons.description:
In their hands, everything was a weapon.

Guards inflict the Broken status effect for 60 seconds when damaging a Survivor.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Flint and Steel
addons.description:
Attacks at night were not uncommon. Fear was often their greatest ally.

After summoning The Carnifex, The Knight can see the auras of Survivors within 24 meters of downed pallets for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Healing Poultice
addons.description:
Their reputation was so large, so horrible, that the mere knowledge that they were coming was enough to bring people to their knees.

After summoning The Assassin, all Survivors within 8 meters from the Guard's initial position have their aura revealed for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Jailer's Chimes
addons.description:
Many captives met the same grisly end for attempting to escape his clutches.

After summoning The Jailer, Survivors that cross his Patrol Path have their aura revealed for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Knight’s Contract
addons.description:
The original document contracting Tarhos to Vittorio’s employ. The laws of man could not stand up, though, to natural law.

After giving an Order, the Guard will remain for an extra 8 seconds, triggering a Hunt if they detect a Survivor.

addons.name: Iridescent Company Banner
addons.description:
Where this banner was raised, those who called themselves "civilized" ran and hid, because for all their codes and laws, they had nothing resembling actual strength.

While a Survivor is Hunted by a Guard, spikes block the exit for the Hunted Survivor. When they vault, that vault location is blocked for all Survivors for the duration of the Hunt.While creating a Patrol Path, passing through vault locations will block these locations for 25 seconds after summoning a Guard.

addons.name: Adi Valente #1
addons.description:
An original copy of the first issue of Adi Valente, the comic her father made while Adriana was a child.

Survivors with a Claw Trap suffer from 20% smaller skill checks. This effect lasts until the Claw Trap is removed.

addons.name: High-Power Floodlight
addons.description:
A sudden and overwhelming light that discombobulates anyone foolish enough to approach.

Survivors with a Claw Trap suffer from the Blindness status effect. This effect lasts until the Claw Trap is removed. Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Geographical Readout
addons.description:
The drones generate and communicate a detailed three-dimensional map of the terrain, making traversal easier.

Gain a 20% action speed bonus to breaking pallets and breakable walls, damaging generators, and vaulting for 8 seconds after deploying a Drone.

addons.name: High Current Upgrade
addons.description:
A wider cable with low resistance that allows faster recharging of batteries.

Increases the time Survivors appear on the radar when detected by 1 second.

addons.name: Adaptive Lighting
addons.description:
The drone takes account of the surrounding area and casts lights in a bewildering manner that obscures movement.

Increases the duration of the Undetectable status effect by 20%. Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Stereo Remote Mic
addons.description:
An upgrade that allows increased three-dimensional audio tracking.

Decreases the Disabled state duration of Drones by 15%.

addons.name: Supercharge
addons.description:
The batteries may run a little hot, but removing the safety protocols from the cells makes them last a little longer.

Increases the battery life of Claw Traps by 15%.

addons.name: Shotgun Speakers
addons.description:
Capable of directing high-frequency noises in a single direction over great distances, the drones can focus in on one individual and distract them from danger for some time.

Survivors with a Claw Trap have no skill check warning. This effect lasts until the Claw Trap is removed.

addons.name: Low-Power Mode
addons.description:
By intermittently powering off and on non-vital components, the drone can stay on for longer.

Decreases Drone Rotation speed by 100%.

addons.name: Powdered Glass
addons.description:
Once used on the strings used for battle kites, this powdered glass took on a much more nefarious purpose on her blade.

Claw Trapped Survivors you hit suffer from the Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 70 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Vital Targeting Processor
addons.description:
An additional process in the drone’s programming more accurately predicts the weaknesses of potential prey.

Increases the Hindered status effect gained by Claw Trapped Survivors when detected by a Drone by 2%. Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Brown Noise Generator
addons.description:
An ominous hum disseminates from the drone, blanketing the soundscape and making it difficult to hear anything else.

Survivors with a Claw Trap suffer from the Oblivious status effect. This lasts until the Claw Trap is removed. Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Loose Screw
addons.description:
A bone-chilling rattling emanates from the drone, and it seems like it make fall at any minute, distracting Survivors from complicated tasks.

Survivors with a Claw Trap suffer from the Exhausted status effect for 6 seconds. Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Infrared Upgrade
addons.description:
Heat-detecting cameras focus in on high-stress individuals with pinpoint accuracy.

Anytime a Claw Trap is removed, the Survivor's aura is revealed for 4 seconds.

addons.name: Randomized Strobes
addons.description:
Lights flash randomly on the ground, making it harder to find purchase on the uneven terrain.

Increases the duration of the Hindered status effect Claw Trapped Survivors suffer from when detected by a Drone by 1 second.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Advanced Movement Prediction
addons.description:
Even after they leave the zone of influence, a refined AI program predicts with high accuracy where a person will go next.

When a Survivor receives a Claw Trap, reveal their aura for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Ultrasonic Speaker
addons.description:
A high-frequency noise blaster that fills the sonic spectrum with disorienting sounds, making it impossible for observers to pick out more important noises.

Decreases Survivors' scan line immunity duration by 10%.

addons.name: Expired Batteries
addons.description:
The batteries on these Claw Traps have been swapped out with old alkaline batteries. Recharging is not recommended.

All Survivors start the trial with a Claw Trap, which has 50% less battery life.Claw Trap battery life increases by 10% for each Claw Trap received, up to 150%.

addons.name: Prototype Rotor
addons.description:
The cutting-edge design allows the drone to move with razor-sharp precision.

Increases Drones' rotation speed by 10%.

addons.name: Iridescent Unpublished Manuscript
addons.description:
Before he disappeared, Adriana’s father had started a newer, darker manga, Sonhadores Sombrios.

When a Drone is disabled, it gains a 32-meter Terror Radius for 15 seconds. During this time, gain the Undetectable status effect.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Broken Security Key
addons.description:
Dozens of security measures were applied across the ship’s equipment, and many of them were in a state of disrepair.

The reboot timer when the EMP affects the Biopods is reduced by 15%.

addons.name: Heavy Water
addons.description:
A byproduct of the microfission reactors powering cryo and life support. Even a tiny leak would prove disastrous for onboard sensors.

Supply cases' aura distance is reduced by 8 meters.

addons.name: Kid’s Ball Glove
addons.description:
A kid’s baseball glove owned by one of the colonists. His memories of a youth playing catch were implanted.

Overclock Mode duration is increased by 8%.

addons.name: Nutritional Slurry
addons.description:
Made for the organics, this disgusting concoction works well to nourish any organic matter.

Get 2 extra Biopods.

addons.name: Diagnostic Tool (Construction)
addons.description:
A device that gives highly accurate information on the lay of the land.

Reveals the auras of Survivors who pick up an EMP for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Diagnostic Tool (Repair)
addons.description:
A device that can find the flaws in constructed objects. Intended to help with repair.

Increases targeting range while in a Biopod by 4 meters.

addons.name: Android Arm
addons.description:
Destroying the other HUX units not only made his extermination of humans easier, it gave him more parts to work with.

Slipstream infection range between Survivors is increased by 2 meters and spreads 25% faster.

addons.name: Cremated Remains
addons.description:
After extracting the other colonists’ DNA, he burned their remains.

Survivors afflicted with Temporal Slipstream suffer from Blindness.

Blindness prevents survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Foreign Plant Fibers
addons.description:
Xenobotanists would have a field day with these strange samples of alien plant life.

Decreases the duration of the Hindered status effect after being stunned by a pallet while in Overclock mode by 20%.

Hindered reduces Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Live Wires
addons.description:
Unconnected wires attached to a live current that have a tendency to deliver a shocking surprise.

A Survivor who is cleansed of Slipstream screams, interrupting their current action.

addons.name: Cryo Gel
addons.description:
A no-friction gel applied to crew members before entering deep cryo sleep.

Slipstreamed Survivors suffer from the Hemorrhage status effect for 60 seconds when hit with a basic attack.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors.

addons.name: Denied Requisition Form
addons.description:
Despite the advent of light speed technology, it seemed nothing could make bureaucracy any faster.

At the start of the trial, EMPs take 30 seconds longer to generate.All survivors start the match Slipstreamed.

addons.name: Iridescent Crystal Shard
addons.description:
A crystal from the alien structure that gave him sentience.

When a Biopod is created, the auras of all Survivors within 10 meters of that Biopod are revealed to you for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
addons.description:
A limitation of organic hearing is a limited aural spectrum. Expanding that range is like gaining an entirely new sense.

Exiting a Biopod within 2 seconds of Slipstreaming a Survivor decreases your Terror Radius by 12 meters for 12 seconds.

addons.name: Spent Oxygen Tank
addons.description:
Without air to breathe, organics don’t last long.

When a survivor becomes Slipstreamed, they are Exhausted for 6 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Nanomachine Gel
addons.description:
A gel that can heal wounds extremely quickly. However, the machines in it have a history of being hacked to hurt people too.

Decreases Biopod cooldown by 15% after Slipstreaming a Survivor.

addons.name: Hyperawareness Spray
addons.description:
Used by crew members during long shifts to avoid lapses in focus. Side effects of overuse include paranoia and, in extreme cases, hallucination.

While a Survivor is Slipstreamed, they hear the Terror Radius as if you were nearby.

addons.name: Hologram Generator
addons.description:
Originally used for communication and entertainment, this has been repurposed for obfuscation.

After a successful Slipstream teleport from a Biopod, the target Survivor suffers from the Oblivious status effect for 60 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Soma Family Photo
addons.description:
A sentimental object that grounds someone to an imagined past.

Slipstreaming a Survivor using a Biopod inflicts a 3% Hindered status effect for 6 seconds.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Crew Manifest
addons.description:
A complete list of biographical data on the entire crew of the ship sent to Dvarka.
