Reveals a Slipstreamed Survivor's aura for 8 seconds when they infect another Survivor.Increases the Slipstream infection range between Survivors by 2 meters.

addons.name: Lambert’s Star Map
addons.description:
Vital for interstellar travel, but not as useful on a smaller scale.

Decreases the flame distance of Turrets by 2 meters.

addons.name: Cereal Rations
addons.description:
Contains 100% of the recommended daily intake of Vitamin A. Tastes awful.

Turret auras are visible while in tunnels and when coming out of vents for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Ripley's Watch
addons.description:
On a ship as massive as the Nostromo, synchronizing watches was important to keep track of work shifts.

When a Turret removes Crawler Mode, it is destroyed automatically.

addons.name: Ovomorph
addons.description:
It looks harmless, but the horrors held inside are immeasurable.

The cooldown of Crawler Mode is 25% faster while outside of tunnels.

addons.name: Drinking Bird
addons.description:
One of the many tchotchkes littering the Nostromo’s living quarters. A bit of whimsy in an otherwise sterile environment.

After exiting a tunnel, Killer Instinct duration is increased by 3 seconds.

Killer Instinct intermittently reveals the location of Survivors.

addons.name: Crew Headset
addons.description:
While they facilitated team communication, the constant chatter made the crew easier to track.

While in tunnels, footstep detection is increased by 6 meters.

addons.name: Emergency Helmet
addons.description:
An extra helmet on the bridge, for use in emergencies only.

Increases resistance to staggering from Turrets by 15%.

addons.name: Ash’s Innards
addons.description:
While hardier, mechanical beings break too when enough force is applied.

Turrets take 15 seconds longer to respawn after they are destroyed.

addons.name: Light Wand
addons.description:
A portable light source used by Ash and Dallas while looking for the invasive creature. Mostly ineffective for lighting larger spaces.

Increases downtime of Turrets by 3 second after exiting a tunnel.

addons.name: Kane’s Helmet
addons.description:
A thin layer of glass was the difference between a minor inconvenience and the tragic destruction of the Nostromo’s crew.

Survivors hit with a Tail Attack are Mangled for 70 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Multipurpose Hatchet
addons.description:
Equally useful for destruction and repair.

Survivors hit by a Tail Attack suffer from Hemorrhage.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Parker’s Headband
addons.description:
A bold fashion choice that doubled as a handy way to wick sweat from the eyes.

After exiting a tunnel, gain 5% Haste for 3 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Molted Skin
addons.description:
The Xenomorph molted many times as it rapidly grew on the Nostromo. Its shed skin was a constant reminder of its presence.

After deploying a Turret, the deploying Survivor suffers from the Exhausted status effect for 30 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Brett’s Cap
addons.description:
This Nostromo ballcap was fashionable, but severely limited his vertical field of vision.

Destroying a Turret causes all Survivors within 16 meters to suffer from Blindness for 25 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Semiotic Keyboard
addons.description:
Its symbols are designed to be universally recognizable, but they take some getting used to.

Generators within 16 meters of a Turret have the intensity of their auras determined by their repair progression.

addons.name: Harpoon Gun
addons.description:
Barely a weapon, its use is only viable in a situation of last resort.

Exiting a tunnel and hitting a Survivor within 30 seconds causes all Survivors further than 16 meters from you to scream and reveal their locations.

addons.name: Cat Carrier
addons.description:
Saving the cat is a noble goal. It’s also very distracting.

Exiting Crawler Mode due to a Turret attack makes you Undetectable for 30 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Self-Destruct Bolt
addons.description:
They needed to be removed to start, and replaced to end, the self-destruct sequence. Just seeing them evokes a sense of urgency.

Increases vault speed by 30% while in Crawler Mode.

addons.name: Improvised Cattle Prod
addons.description:
A brutal and noisy weapon, which might have been more effective against a cow.

Each time a generator is completed, a 15-second timer starts. Any Survivor who comes within 10 meters of a Control Station during that time has their aura revealed for the remainder of the timer.

addons.name: Acidic Blood
addons.description:
When damaged, the Xenomorph’s unique physiology made it deadlier than ever.

While exiting a tunnel in Crawler Mode, any Survivor who stuns you with a pallet in the next 20 seconds takes damage. If that Survivor is already injured, they suffer from Deep Wound.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

addons.name: Strobing Light
addons.description:
With the right training, can be used to make people more suggestible.

Decreases the Terror Radius by 8 meters when Hidey-Ho Mode is in cooldown.

addons.name: Doll Eyes
addons.description:
One of the advantages of possessing a mass-produced doll is easy access to replacement parts.

While in Hidey-Ho Mode, reveals auras of all windows and downed pallets within 20 meters.

addons.name: Tiny Scalpel
addons.description:
Sometimes, a precision cut can lead to a beautiful bleed.

While in Hidey-Ho Mode, blood pools are more visible.

addons.name: Good Guy Box
addons.description:
Someone kept this box around in case they needed to bring Chucky back to the store.

Decreases Slice & Dice hit cooldown by 7%.

addons.name: Power Drill
addons.description:
Comes with a dozen convenient drill tips. They all make a big mess when applied to people.

Reduces Hidey-Ho Mode cooldown by 10% after hitting a Survivor with Slice & Dice.

addons.name: Electric Carving Knife
addons.description:
The annoying buzzing sound means it’s ready to carve some flesh.

Decreases Slice & Dice miss cooldown by 5%.

addons.name: Jump Rope
addons.description:
Good for a bit of exercise, or for tying up your target.

Increases duration of Slice & Dice by 8%.

addons.name: Hair Spray & Candle
addons.description:
An aerosolized inferno that will ensure a bad hair day is the least of your worries.

Decreases the time that basic attacks remove from Hidey-Ho Mode by 20%.

addons.name: Automatic Screwdriver
addons.description:
A good way to make mechanical adjustments on the fly.

Missing a Slice & Dice reduces Hidey-Ho Mode cooldown by 8%.

addons.name: Portable TV
addons.description:
Small enough for any room. Just keep it out of the bath.

Slice & Dice duration increased by 70% once the Exit Gates have been powered.

addons.name: Silk Pillow
addons.description:
For when you want to smother your target with silky-smooth softness.

Terror Radius is reduced by 6 meters, but Slice & Dice charge time is increased by 50%.

addons.name: Iridescent Amulet
addons.description:
A pendant of great power, recreated within the Realm.

Increases duration of Hidey-Ho Mode by 50%. Basic attacks immediately end Hidey-Ho Mode.

addons.name: Plastic Bag
addons.description:
Nothing tires out a kill like a lack of oxygen.

If a Survivor walks through an illusory Footfall, they suffer from Exhausted for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating other perks that cause Exhausted.

addons.name: Pile of Nails
addons.description:
It’s a lot easier to stay hidden when your target is worried about a pile of nails flying at their head.

Upon manually exiting Hidey-Ho Mode, The Good Guy remains Undetectable for 3 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Yardstick
addons.description:
Good for measuring distance. Even better for laying down a beating.

A Scamper reveals Survivor auras within 16 meters of you for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Running Shoes
addons.description:
The latest in high-performance killer doll athletic technology.

Gain 2% movement speed after a Scamper for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Rat Poison
addons.description:
The secret ingredient in a killer chili.

While performing a Slice & Dice, the auras of Survivors within 6 meters of you are revealed for 2.5 seconds.

addons.name: Straight Razor
addons.description:
For when a close shave needs to be really, really close.

Slice & Dice attacks inflict the Hemorrhage and Mangled  status effects for 80 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Hard Hat
addons.description:
Keeps the dome intact while performing high-impact activities.

Performing a Scamper under a pallet breaks it immediately.

addons.name: Mirror Shards
addons.description:
A bunch of shattered mirror pieces that reflect light and shadow, further disorienting the already disoriented.

The Good Guy can see the illusory Footfalls around Survivors.

addons.name: Rabbit's Foot
addons.description:
The unlucky creature’s remains were found by a tree, its intestines wedged between its teeth.

Blood pools appear bright red when charging UVX.

Survivors injured by UVX suffer from the Hemorrhage status effect for 45 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors.

addons.name: Footprint Cast
addons.description:
The cast sits in the Museum of the Weird in Sarasota, Florida and has long since been debunked.

Decreases the time until the next Hallucination spawns by 15 seconds when a Survivor becomes Weakened.

Weakened Survivors lose health states when hit by UVX’s Blast Area.

addons.name: Blurry Photo
addons.description:
The photo was found at an abandoned campsite. The campers were never seen again.

After Teleporting, regain full movement speed 7% faster.

addons.name: Slashed Backpack
addons.description:
When the hiker was rescued from the mountain pass, she insisted her companion would never wander off alone.

UVX triggers a Blast Area upon contact with Hallucinations.Hallucinations can be destroyed by UVX. Doing so decreases the time until the next Hallucination spawns by 65%.

addons.name: Punctured Eyeball
addons.description:
The station was a scene of madness. The officers had seemingly turned on each other.

Survivors who are both Weakened and injured suffer from the Deep Wound status effect when they Dispel a Hallucination.

Deep Wound will put a Survivor in the dying state unless it is mended before the timer runs out.

Weakened Survivors lose health states when hit by UVX’s Blast Area.

addons.name: Notebook of Theories
addons.description:
His studio apartment was empty and reeked of black mold. The book was the only thing left.

Survivors hit by UVX while it is airborne suffer from the Hindered status effect for an additional 2 seconds.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Last Known Recording
addons.description:
She studied musique concrète before she disappeared, her screams the last sound on the tape.

Decreases your Hallucinations’ Aura Range that is visible to Survivors by 35%.

addons.name: Sketch Attempt
addons.description:
The victim’s child was given paper and crayons at the station, while he waited for his father to pick him up.

Survivors hit by UVX's Blast Area suffer from the Oblivious status effect for 20 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Victim’s Map
addons.description:
He thought the key to solving the mystery lay beyond the forest, and feared he would never return.

When a Survivor successfully Stares Down The Unknown, The Unknown gains Killer Instinct for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Vanishing Box
addons.description:
The magician was popular at children’s parties, and quickly became the top suspect.

Survivors who complete generators become Weakened against UVX.Increases Hallucination spawn time by 120%.

Weakened Survivors lose health states when hit by the UVX's Blast Area.

addons.name: Front-Page Article
addons.description:
The assailant had torn gaping holes in the walls of the cabin, and drove the family into the woods.

Performing the break interaction on a pallet or breakable wall decreases the time until the next Hallucination spawns by 50%.

addons.name: Hypnotist’s Watch
addons.description:
Hypnotherapy was recommended to recover repressed memories. What emerged from his mind would be his undoing.

Survivors hit by UVX while it is airborne suffer from the Exhausted status effect for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: B-Movie Poster
addons.description:
The movie was rumored to be state-funded propaganda, made specifically for something called Project Apple-Pie.

Survivors damaged by UVX's Blast Area suffer from the Broken status effect for 30 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Device of Undisclosed Origin
addons.description:
Was the thing made on Earth? Or somewhere else entirely?

Survivors entering the Aura Range of a Hallucination suffer from the Oblivious status effect.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Homemade Mask
addons.description:
The killer had made the mask in the shed in his backyard, where he would bring the others when the sun went down.

Survivors who Dispel Hallucinations suffer from the Blindness status effect for 60 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Obscure Game Cartridge
addons.description:
Some maintained Project Apple-Pie evolved over time, turning to new forms of media for results.

Triggers for 20 seconds following a Teleport.Increases the action speed for breaking downed pallets, breakable walls, damaging generators, and vaulting windows by 30%.

addons.name: Discarded Milk Carton
addons.description:
She decided to take the long way home, and waved goodbye to her friends before parting ways.

Doubles the UVX projectile's bounce strength.

addons.name: Serum Vial
addons.description:
The molecular structure of the substance was synthesized in the lab, but its effects could never be replicated.

Survivors within a Hallucination’s Aura Range suffer from the Exhausted status effect for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Captured by the Dark
addons.description:
The documentary purported that the disappearances were linked to small-town cinemas. Audiences left the theater feeling uneasy.

Survivors begin the trial Weakened.Decreases the maximum number of Hallucinations that can be spawned by 1.

Weakened Survivors lose health states when hit by UVX’s Blast Area.

addons.name: Iridescent OSS Report
addons.description:
The report was redacted to the point of being meaningless. But still, theorists tried to extract meaning from it.

Decreases Teleport cooldown by 5 seconds.The Decoy left behind after The Unknown teleports takes 10 seconds longer to disappear.When created, the Decoy has the same Terror Radius and Red Stain as The Unknown.

addons.name: Tattered Headband
addons.description:
An enchanted accessory once owned by a powerful summoner. It still carries a whisper of its former magic.

Increases the distance of Flight of the Damned’s spectral entities by 4 meters.

addons.name: Raven's Feather
addons.description:
A material component most typically used for the Fly spell.

Increases duration of the Fly spell by 0.5 second.

addons.name: Trickster's Glove
addons.description:
A glove once belonging to an arcane trickster whose mastery of Mage Hand clings to its fibers.

Increases the time Mage Hand holds a pallet up by 0.3 second.

addons.name: Crystal Ball
addons.description:
Used by spellcasters for centuries to scry upon friend and foe alike.

When a Survivor is revealed by Dispelling Sphere, the Killer Instinct effect lasts for an additional 1 seconds.

addons.name: Lantern of Revealing
addons.description:
Even those who evade your attacks cannot evade your gaze.

Reveals the aura of Survivors narrowly missed by Flight of the Damned for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Potion of Speed
addons.description:
A curious concoction that downgrades the rules of physics to mere suggestions.

Decreases the period where you cannot attack after casting Fly by 0.1 seconds.

addons.name: Ring of Telekinesis
addons.description:
Its arcane energy crackles to life when its user manipulates objects from afar.

Increases vault speed by 10% for 10 seconds after casting Mage Hand on an upright pallet.

addons.name: Glass Eye
addons.description:
A material component used to cast spells of detection.

Increases the size of Dispelling Sphere by 2 meters and its movement speed by 10%.

addons.name: Ring of Spell Storing
addons.description:
A magical ring that rewards those who are well-prepared.

Decreases the cooldown of all spells by 1 second.

addons.name: Ornate Horn
addons.description:
Once used to rally troops to battle, its very presence brings great armies to bear.

Increases the number of entities created by Flight of the Damned by 1.

addons.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
addons.description:
Its colors are constantly shifting, making you more difficult to detect from afar.

Reduces Terror Radius by 22 meters while the Fly spell is active.

addons.name: Boots of Speed
addons.description:
A simple click of their heels grants their wearer incredible pace.

Casting Mage Hand grants you 3% Haste for 2 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Staff of Withering
addons.description:
Its necrotic power brings its targets closer to death.

Dispelling Sphere causes the Exhausted status effect for 30 seconds to Survivors who enter its radius.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Pearl of Power
addons.description:
Its shimmering face energizes mages who hold it, allowing them to cast more spells.

Reduces the remaining cooldown for your spells by 2 seconds each time you land a basic attack.

addons.name: Robe of Eyes
addons.description:
When worn, none can escape its bearer’s unyielding gaze.

Reveals the auras of Survivors within 6 meters of a Treasure Chest for 4 seconds each time you cast a spell.

addons.name: Dragontooth Dagger
addons.description:
Made from the actual tooth of a dragon, its edge is jagged and cruel.

Applies Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects to Survivors hit with a basic attack while holding a Magic Item for 60 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Cloak of Invisibility
addons.description:
A powerful magic item, envied by rogues and the conflict-averse alike.

Gain Undetectable for 20 seconds each time all of your spells are on cooldown at the same time.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Bag of Holding
addons.description:
The realm itself bends to its astounding capacity, populating trials with even more to take.

Two Treasure Chests are guaranteed to roll 1 on the dice roll.Opening Treasure Chests grants the Oblivious status effect to Survivors for 15 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing and being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Vorpal Sword
addons.description:
A powerful magical artifact whose blade has severed many a head from its accompanying body.

Any injured Survivor that enters a Dispelling Sphere screams and gains Broken for 30 seconds.Using the Mage Hand spell on a downed pallet breaks that pallet in 4 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Iridescent Book of Vile Darkness
addons.description:
The ultimate compilation of cruelty, wickedness and depravity.

Using the Fly spell to pass through any vault location blocks that location for Survivors for 45 seconds.Lowers the number of spectral entities created by Flight of the Damned by 3 and makes them fly lower to the ground.

addons.name: Sylph Feather
addons.description:
An enchanted feather that grants its holder great agility.

Breaking a pallet grants The Dark Lord a token. For each token held, Hellfire's cooldown is decreased by 5%, to a maximum of 25%.

addons.name: Ruby Circlet
addons.description:
An enchanted headpiece that brings even the mightiest of flames to heel.

Decreases the cooldown of Hellfire by 5%.

addons.name: Cerberus Talon
addons.description:
A sharp memento from one of Dracula’s most terrifying guards.

Increases the reveal distance of Scent Orb by 100%.

addons.name: Clock Tower Gear
addons.description:
A piece of the great clock tower, a reminder of the inevitability of time itself.

Reduces the cooldown of Shapeshift by 5%.

addons.name: Magical Ticket
addons.description:
A strange artifact once used to transport across Dracula’s castle.

Increases the maximum speed of Teleport by 10%.

addons.name: Moonstone Necklace
addons.description:
A simple necklace by day, but its power comes to life in the dark.

Reduces the size of the Terror Radius in Vampire and Wolf Forms by 8 meters.

addons.name: Blood-Filled Goblet
addons.description:
The blood of his victims sustains him and makes him an even greater hunter.

Increases the duration of Scent Orbs by 60%.

addons.name: Traveler’s Hat
addons.description:
A wide-brimmed hat that once belonged to a well-traveled man.

Increases Shapeshift speed by 5%.

addons.name: Winged Boots
addons.description:
Long used by their wearers to move quickly.

Increases maximum distance of Teleport by 20%.

addons.name: White Wolf Medallion
addons.description:
A trinket once used to call a great spirit guide.

Increases Killer Instinct duration by 1 second while in Wolf Form after Survivors complete rushed actions.

addons.name: Killer Doll
addons.description:
One of Dracula’s minions, and a reminder that all are his playthings.

Increases the cooldown reduction of Pounce Attacks from Scent Orbs by 30%.

addons.name: Sunglasses
addons.description:
They protect against bright lights, in addition to looking cool.

Hellfire has 1 extra pillar. Increases Hellfire charging time by 25%.

addons.name: Force of Echo
addons.description:
An artifact that grants bats even greater senses in the dark.

Increases the spawn rate of Scent Orbs by 10%.

addons.name: Pocket Watch
addons.description:
A tool that bends the rules of time itself.

Breaking a pallet or wall resets the Teleport cooldown.

addons.name: Medusa’s Hair
addons.description:
A snakelike memento from one of Dracula's most ancient and fearsome minions.

All Survivors within 8 meters of your teleport destination suffer from an 8% Hindered status effect for 4 seconds.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Warg’s Fang
addons.description:
A mighty tool of destruction taken from one of Dracula’s most dangerous allies.

Reveals the auras of all Survivors whose Scent Orbs you have collected whenever Pounce Attack becomes available for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Cube of Zoe
addons.description:
A strange box whose presence creates something from nothing.

When a generator is completed, creates pillars of Hellfire around The Dark Lord for 10 seconds.

addons.name: Lapis Lazuli
addons.description:
A stone said to bring luck to its holders, or take it from their enemies.

After Teleporting to a window vault, the Entity blocks that window for Survivors for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Alucard’s Shield
addons.description:
A family heirloom that blocks its bearer’s enemies at every turn.

When the gates are opened, pillars of Hellfire continuously spawn within the exit gates.

addons.name: Iridescent Ring of Vlad
addons.description:
A unique relic belonging to Dracula. It is said none can approach The Dark Lord without it.

Hellfire pillars home in on nearby Survivors.

addons.name: Young Coconut
addons.description:
Her first meal as a castaway, she shared it with her loyal companion.

Increases the Dog's Chase speed by 5%.

addons.name: Sticky Pitch
addons.description:
A vital commodity for keeping a ship in tip-top shape.

Increases The Houndmaster's bonus movement speed gained while running on the Search Path by 2%.

addons.name: Creature's Bone
addons.description:
It was unlike anything she'd ever seen, and the marrow in its bones was delectable.

The Dog's stun duration is reduced by 50%.

addons.name: Trainer's Book
addons.description:
Some of the advice contained within helped strengthen their bond.

Increases Houndsense duration by 35%.

addons.name: Barley Meal
addons.description:
The key ingredient for a bland but reinvigorating porridge.

Increases the Dog's initial Chase distance by 20%.

addons.name: Belaying Pins
addons.description:
Ideal for holding rope, securing knots, and rigging sails.

Survivors revealed by Killer Instinct when entering the Houndsense Radius also become Oblivious for 20 seconds.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Smoked Snapper
addons.description:
A protein-packed foodstuff, preserved to ensure its quality over long expeditions.

Power cooldown is reduced by 5%.

addons.name: Knotted Rope
addons.description:
The dog's jaws tightened around the makeshift toy, and he thrashed it back and forth.

Reduces the cooldown of basic attacks against Survivors injured while in the Dog's Grab by 2%.

addons.name: Spyglass
addons.description:
Used to spot what one is looking for, no matter how far away.

When Houndsense duration ends, the Survivor's aura is revealed for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Waterskin
addons.description:
She gave him the last of her water, knowing he needed the strength to hunt.

Increases the Dog's Chase redirect distance by 20%.

addons.name: Unfinished Map
addons.description:
Features details on the area that would come to be known as the Bermuda Triangle.

Survivors revealed by Killer Instinct when entering the Houndsense Radius also become Exhausted for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Training Bell
addons.description:
Even over great distances, it will notify a dog exactly where their owner is.

When the Dog is stunned, the responsible Survivor's aura is revealed for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Spiked Collar
addons.description:
A dangerous accessory worn by dogs sent to battle.

Survivors injured while in the Dog's grab suffer from Mangled and Hemorrhage for 60 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Fatty Meat
addons.description:
A strange and irresistible treat for a canine friend.

Survivors who are affected by Houndsense periodically scream without notifying The Houndmaster every 15 seconds.

addons.name: Leather Harness
addons.description:
Allows greater control over a dog’s every movement.

Increases the Dog's Chase speed by 20% for 30 seconds after a generator is repaired.This bonus becomes permanent once all generators are repaired.

addons.name: Gunpowder Tin
addons.description:
Useful for all manner of explosive schemes.

Increases the action speed for breaking downed pallets, breakable walls, and damaging generators by 30% for 20 seconds when at least one Survivor becomes affected by Houndsense.

addons.name: Marlinspike
addons.description:
As good for unsplicing rope as it is for causing grievous bodily harm.

Survivors within 20 meters of a Survivor who is Grabbed by the Dog become afflicted with Houndsense.

addons.name: Ship Figurehead
addons.description:
A trophy torn from the bow of another ship.

While the Dog is following The Houndmaster, Terror Radius is increased by 8 meters.While the Dog is away from The Houndmaster, Terror Radius is reduced by 8 meters.

addons.name: Torn Novel
addons.description:
A book given to her by her father. All but destroyed after a raid.

While aiming the Chase Redirect, auras of Survivors within 10 meters of the Dog are revealed.Upon reassuming control of The Houndmaster, Survivors' auras revealed this way are shown for an additional 2 seconds.

addons.name: Iridescent Wheel Handle
addons.description:
Once used to guide a great vessel across the open seas, its remnants now serve as a memory of times past.

Increases the time the Dog lingers at a Search destination by 20%.While the Dog is running to and from the Search destination, The Houndmaster gains the Undetectable status effect.Standing on the Search Path removes the Undetectable status effect.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Kaneki’s Wallet
addons.description:
Lost to a strange boy who happened to bump into him on the street.

Increases the window to perform consecutive Kagune Leaps by 3 second.

addons.name: The Black Goat’s Egg
addons.description:
The book he used to bond with a woman of consequence.

Perfectly timed grab-attacks grant a 100% Bloodpoints bonus.

addons.name: Anteiku Apron
addons.description:
Standard-issue uniform at a lovely little coffee shop.

Decrease the slide after a Kagune Leap by 50%.

addons.name: Fresh Coffee
addons.description:
Every ghoul's favorite drink, the one human delicacy they can consume.

Increases Kagune Leap speed by 14%.

addons.name: Broken Chain
addons.description:
Nothing could restrain him once he finally embraced his full potential.

Decreases Kagune Leap cooldown by 35% when not Enraged.

addons.name: Kaneki's Satchel
addons.description:
Essential gear for any student trying to keep up with their studies.

Increases the speed of the third consecutive Kagune Leap by 30%.

addons.name: Hide’s Headphones
addons.description:
They belonged to his best friend, who he tried to keep safe at all costs.

Survivors affected by Kagune Mark are afflicted with the Oblivious status effect.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing and being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Taiyaki
addons.description:
Ghouls can never eat human food, but they can find ways to pretend.

Increases the Enraged Mode countdown by 5 seconds.

addons.name: Blood-Stained Handkerchief
addons.description:
Even a single drop of blood can excite the senses of any gourmet.

Increases the Kagune's reach by 1 meter.

addons.name: Mado’s Glove
addons.description:
A glove worn by a ghoul investigator.

Upon removing Kagune Mark, Survivors suffer from the Exhausted status effect for 15 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Hinami’s Umbrella
addons.description:
It was raining the day her mother was viciously taken from her.

Increases the amount of time added to the Enraged countdown for each perfectly timed grab-attack by 10 seconds.

addons.name: Rize's Glasses
addons.description:
They made her look innocent enough, which was exactly what she wanted.

Upon entering Enraged Mode, reveals the auras of any healthy Survivors repairing generators for 8 seconds.

addons.name: Aogiri Tree Robe
addons.description:
Garments worn by an anti-human ghoul organization.

If a generator is completed while The Ghoul is in Enraged Mode, gain the Undetectable status effect for 20 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Amon’s Necktie
addons.description:
Cold, calculated, precise. He had a firm grasp of every situation.

While aiming mid-Leap, reveals the auras of pallets and windows within 32 meters.

addons.name: Red Spider Lily
addons.description:
The white flowers turned red as blood.

While in Enraged Mode, base attacks afflict Survivors with the Hemorrhage status effect for 60 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: CCG ID Card
addons.description:
A card carried by every ghoul investigator.

Performing a Kagune Leap vault reveals the auras of all Kagune Marked Survivors within 24 meters for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Red-Headed Centipede
addons.description:
The thing caused him immeasurable torment.

Vaulting while in Enraged Mode blocks that vault location for 10 seconds.

addons.name: Torture Apparatus
addons.description:
A cutting tool used every time his extremities grew back.

When Enraged Mode ends, The Ghoul gains 5% Haste for 6 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Yamori’s Mask
addons.description:
Worn by a ghoul from the 13th district whose hobby was torture.

Upon hooking a Survivor while in Enraged Mode, all Survivors further than 40 meters scream and reveal their location for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Iridescent Eye Patch
addons.description:
An innocent way to hide his true nature from the world.

Performing a pallet vault on your third consecutive Kagune Leap while in Enraged Mode destroys the pallet.

addons.name: Help Wanted Ad
addons.description:
We all need a little help sometimes...

While winding up an axe throw, see a preview of the starting trajectory.

addons.name: Security Guard’s Badge
addons.description:
The badge comes with certain privileges for whoever carries it.

When exiting a Security Door after a teleport, gain the Undetectable status effect for 25% longer.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Restaurant Menu
addons.description:
The lamination is peeling and crusty. How appetizing.

Decreases the minimum time required to retrieve an axe embedded in the environment by 20%.

addons.name: Rotten Pizza
addons.description:
Food poisoning is no laughing matter.

Increases the duration of Killer Instinct from the Axe's area of effect by 100%.

addons.name: Ripped Curtain
addons.description:
Taken from Pirates Cove, caught on the animatronic that lived there.

When an Axe hits a Survivor, they gain the Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 60 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Greasy Paper Plate
addons.description:
It sticks to everything it touches. No amount of soap can wash it off.

Increases the time required for Survivors to remove the Axe by 15%.

addons.name: Streamers
addons.description:
Employees would throw them over the rafters for a quick decoration.

Increases the speed at which you travel through Security Doors by 15%.

addons.name: Party Hat
addons.description:
The party never ends, no matter how much they beg.

When an Axe is embedded in the environment:Increases its area of effect radius to 250% over 3 seconds.Decreases the duration of the area of effect by 20%.

addons.name: Office Phone
addons.description:
He tried to leave messages as a warning. He didn't last long, either.

Survivors within 24 meters of a Survivor with an embedded Axe gain the Oblivious and - if injured - Broken status effects. Reveals the aura of the Axe to Survivors within this range.

Decreases the time required to remove the Axe from another Survivor by 50%.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Chica’s Bib
addons.description:
A good way to keep Mr. Cupcake from making a mess.

Survivors within the Axe's area of effect gain the Exhausted status effect for 5 seconds.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Bonnie’s Guitar Strings
addons.description:
Worn strings that are off-tune and liable to snap.

Unlocks potential in one’s aura reading ability.

While moving between Security Doors, the repair progress of generators can be determined by the intensity of their auras.

Decreases the duration of the Undetectable status effect upon exiting the Security Door by 100%.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Foxy’s Hook
addons.description:
A pirate’s hook that seems more menacing than playful.

Players within range of the Axe's area of effect gain 7% Haste for 6 seconds.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Purple Guy Drawing
addons.description:
He only takes 10 seconds to draw!

While a Survivor has an Axe embedded in them, any rushed interactions they perform reveal their aura to you for 3 seconds.

Removing the Axe from themselves reveals their aura to you for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Freddy’s Hat
addons.description:
Gabriel trusted the wrong grown-up. Now he's the star of the show.

Increases the Axe's weight while throwing by 100%.

addons.name: Loot Bag
addons.description:
Open the bag, and see what goodies are inside.

While a Survivor has an Axe embedded in them: Exit gates will be blocked for them and any Survivors within 12 meters.

addons.name: Access Panel
addons.description:
Gaining control over the security doors is key to getting the job done.

Your Axe gains the ability to travel through Security Doors, and will exit straight through the connected Security Door.

When aiming your Axe:Gain Killer Instinct on Survivors within 4 meters of any Security Door.Reveals the auras of all Security Door numbers.

addons.name: Celebrate! Poster
addons.description:
The celebration lasts all night long, or until no one is left.

While the Axe is embedded in a Survivor, all players within 32 meters gain 12% Haste and vault 20% faster.

Haste increases Killer movement speed.

addons.name: Faz-Coin
addons.description:
Collecting these tokens comes with a price.

Upon throwing the Axe, it gains a Terror Radius of 24 meters until it is reclaimed. You gain the Undetectable status effect for 10 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Endo CPU
addons.description:
Greater computing power, for greater efficacy.

While within the Axe's area of effect, pallets, breakable doors, and generators break 40% faster. This effect lingers for 5 seconds after leaving the area of effect.

addons.name: Iridescent Remnant
addons.description:
Molten metal - in the right hands, it's the key to immortality.

When you start moving to a Security Door, upright pallets within 32 meters of the destination Door are blocked for 12 seconds.

addons.name: Sticky Lozenge
addons.description:
A simple tablet to moisten a dry throat, often taken before an audition.

When charging Regurgitate, see a preview of the impact zone.

addons.name: Broken Tiara
addons.description:
A dazzling stage prop worn by a pharaoh's daughter, as distracting as it is fake.

Survivors are Oblivious under the Glowing Fungus' effect.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Luckless Mouse
addons.description:
A game of cat and mouse always gets the blood pumping.

Increases Headlong Flight's charges by 2.

addons.name: First Libretto
addons.description:
She felt as if she could walk on the air after landing a role in her first opera.

Decreases Headlong Flight's consumption rate by 30% for 15 seconds any time you hook a Leeched Survivor.

addons.name: Wriggling Parasite
addons.description:
A fragile organism that has an unusual effect on its host.

Increases the passive growth rate to Leeched II by 16%.

addons.name: Chunk of Malai
addons.description:
A varied source of protein contributes to good gut health.

Decreases the Glowing Fungus' cleanse rate by 8% for each Leeched Survivor.

addons.name: Crumpled Sheet Music
addons.description:
Before her desperation, she hoped that continued practice would be enough to succeed.

Gain 12 charges to Headlong Flight when a Survivor is hit by a Leeching Gland.

addons.name: Defective Metronome
addons.description:
The metronome sparks as it plays at a frenetic pace.

Survivors under the Glowing Fungus' effect are Exhausted.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating certain perks.

addons.name: Pig's Eye
addons.description:
It still glistens with saliva.

When a Survivor eats a Glowing Fungus from further than 40 meters away, their aura is revealed to you for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Chicken Head
addons.description:
Believed by some to have mystical properties, this particular sample was lodged in the Krasue's throat after a feed.

All Survivors start afflicted with Leeched I.2 additional Glowing Fungi are spawned at the start of the trial.

addons.name: Janjira's Hand
addons.description:
One of the few distinguishable parts that remained of her friend.

Gain 2 Headlong Flight charges whenever a generator is repaired. Headlong Flight's recharge rate is increased by 25% for 15 seconds.When 5 generators are repaired, Headlong Flight is fully charged and the recharge rate is permanently increased by 25%.

addons.name: Dulled Knife
addons.description:
A stage prop, symbolic of a woman's gambit in an attempt to save her lover on death's row.

Decreases Headlong Flight's charge consumption by 25%.Glowing Fungus grants Survivors 10% Haste for 5 seconds while preventing scratch marks, pools of blood, grunts of pain, and aura reveals.

Haste increases Survivor's movement speed.

addons.name: Spattered Handkerchief
addons.description:
A sign that something was very wrong presented itself but she chose to ignore it.

When the exit gates are powered, all Survivors are afflicted with Leeched I. Glowing Fungi begin to decay and activating Corporeal Weave no longer creates new Glowing Fungi.

addons.name: Framed Newspaper
addons.description:
She had once made it onto the entertainment section of the city's newspaper but she wanted more.

Increases Headlong Flight's charges by 6 and its recharge rate by 15%.Headlong Flight must be at least half-charged to activate.

addons.name: Lorenza's Remains
addons.description:
Even her pet bird would fall victim to the Krasue's thirst for blood.

Leeched I applies Blindness.Leeched II applies 4% Hindered.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Shredded Gown
addons.description:
She tore at her clothes and into her flesh as her body burnt.

Corporeal Weave reveals the auras of all Survivors who are within 8 meters of Glowing Fungus or holding Glowing Fungus of their own for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Rotten Swine
addons.description:
A revolting meal that left her disgusted when she awoke.

Hitting a generator, dropped pallet, or breakable wall with a Leeching Gland marks it.Damaging or breaking the marked item is 15% faster and removes the mark.Only one object can be marked at a time.

addons.name: Theater Binoculars
addons.description:
A pair of glasses that have watched many tragedies.

Hitting a non-Leeched Survivor with Intestinal Whip reveals the auras of other Survivors within 24 meters for 5 seconds.

addons.name: Queen's Scepter
addons.description:
The stage prop of a vengeful queen who demands blood.

Successful Intestinal Whip hits cause a Leeching Gland to spatter near the Survivor.

addons.name: Mysterious Elixir
addons.description:
A liquid moulded from The Fog itself. Though similar to the concoction she drank, there seem to be slight alterations.

Hit a window with Leeching Gland to mark it.Vault the marked window to block it for Survivors only for 10 seconds. Removes the mark.

addons.name: Orderly ID
addons.description:
Bears the face of Henry Creel as he appeared before he was changed by another dimension.

While out of Worldbreaker Mode, the Vine Attack's aiming range is increased by 2 meters.

addons.name: Bead Maze
addons.description:
A developmental toy used to enrich the minds of captive children.

Increases the second phase of the Worldbreaker Timer by 2.5 seconds for each living Survivor.

addons.name: Shattered Wrist Rocket
addons.description:
A once-powerful slingshot, now laid to ruin.

The explosion from the Undergate Attack breaks pallets instantly and damages generators caught in the blast.

addons.name: Stained Glass Mural
addons.description:
A design once found on the Creel family door. Now it darkens the door of another dimension.

While Upside Down traversal is on cooldown, breaking pallets and walls decreases that cooldown by 12 seconds.

addons.name: Smashed Cassette Deck
addons.description:
They once used music to escape Henry's grasp. Without it, they do not stand a chance.

All Survivors start with one Worldbreaker token. When Worldbreaker is activated for the first time, all Survivors lose their Worldbreaker Tokens. 

1 less Grandfather Clock appears on the map.

addons.name: Bloody Roller Skate
addons.description:
A memento of the fury that Eleven was capable of.

Gain the Haste status effect for 1.5 seconds upon exiting the Undergate Attack.

addons.name: Gutted Supercom
addons.description:
A broken communication device that now crackles to life at the most terrifying times.

While out of Worldbreaker Mode, Survivors hit by Vine Attacks have their aura shown for 1.5 seconds.

addons.name: Mid-Century Radio
addons.description:
It sat silent in the Creel's dining room until the slaughter was about to begin.

While in Worldbreaker Mode, Grandfather Clocks more than 32 meters away being worked on by Survivors have their auras revealed.

addons.name: Clock Hands
addons.description:
Hands of the Creel family's grandfather clock, corrupted by Henry's dark power.

Survivors gain the Oblivious status effect when interacting with Grandfather Clocks, and for 12 seconds after.

Oblivious prevents Survivors from hearing or being affected by the Killer's Terror Radius.

addons.name: Electrode Cap
addons.description:
Used to measure the brain's electrical activity. In the lab, nothing goes unnoticed.

At the start of the second phase of Worldbreaker Mode (or when Survivors complete the Grandfather Clock interactions), Survivors more than 26 meters away from the Killer have their aura revealed for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Forged Death Certificate
addons.description:
A piece of paper used to prove the death of a powerful person who was very much alive.

For each successful Worldbreaker Token placed on a Survivor via Vine Attack, gain the Undetectable status effect until the next Worldbreaker Mode activation.

addons.name: Rabbit Remains
addons.description:
Before massacring his family, Henry started small, killing rabbits and leaving their corpses strewn about town.

Survivors standing in or entering the Undergate Attack's radius become Exhausted for 10 seconds.

Increases the Upside Down Ability cooldown by 5 seconds.

addons.name: Neck Tendril
addons.description:
He was furious when the tendril was torn from his neck as Max escaped his mind realm.

Survivors hit by the Vine Attack while in Worldbreaker Mode receive Hemorrhage and Mangled status effects for 70 seconds.

Hemorrhage regresses healing progress when not healing, and increases blood trails left by injured Survivors. This lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Victor's Razor Blade
addons.description:
In his grief, Henry's father used a hidden blade to take out his own eyes.

When Worldbreaker Mode ends, injured Survivors become afflicted with the Broken status effect for the next 20 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Broken Skateboard
addons.description:
A cool way to get around, smashed by a furious brother as a means of control.

When Worldbreaker Mode starts, you basic-vault Windows 30% faster and the auras of Pallets and Windows within 32 meters are revealed to you for 65 seconds.

addons.name: Black Widow Spider
addons.description:
A terrifying spider that is no longer a mere hallucination.

Entering the Upside Down while in Worldbreaker Mode makes the furthest Survivor, more than 36 meters away reveal their location for 3 seconds.

addons.name: Pizza Goggles
addons.description:
Used while Eleven entered sensory deprivation, they rid the user of distractions and focus the mind.

The Undergate Attack's area of effect range is reduced by 90%, and its cooldown time is shortened by 25 seconds.

Your exit cooldown time after executing the Undergate Attack is reduced by 80%.

addons.name: Electroshock Collar
addons.description:
A cruelly efficient method of training and punishing the facility's prisoners.

When coming out of the Upside Down, all vault locations within 32 meters are blocked for 12 seconds.

addons.name: Chess Piece
addons.description:
One of the few forms of entertainment while in the facility, it helped the students learn logic and tactics.

The Vine Attack has two charges, and its attack radius is diminished by 40%.

addons.name: Iridescent Soteria Chip
addons.description:
A chip that once limited his powers is now a source of even greater power.

When Worldbreaker activates, the Killer gains Undetectable, and Survivors with at least one Worldbreaker Token have their aura revealed when coming within 12 meters of the Killer.

This lasts until the Killer performs a Vine Attack, enters the Upside Down, or Worldbreaker ends.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Akito's Crutch
addons.description:
The crutch used by Kazan's son after falling from a tree. Akito's playmate and her family were punished for the boy's injury.

Increases movement speed of Demon Dash by 13%.

addons.name: Blackened Toenail
addons.description:
Fell off during one of Kazan's hundred winter treks to the temple. Despite his pilgrimage, Akito's leg would never heal.

Increases movement speed while absorbing Blood Orbs by 0.4 m/s.

addons.name: Bloody Sash
addons.description:
Blood from a boy who called Kazan The Imposter Noble. Kazan hid evidence of the fight from his father, often reveling at the sash in secret.

Increases movement speed while absorbing Blood Orbs by 0.7 m/s.

addons.name: Child's Wooden Sword
addons.description:
Akito's practice sword. The child had little use for it after his injury.

Increases Blood Orb aura reading range by 3 meters.

addons.name: Chipped Saihai
addons.description:
A baton that belonged to Renjiro, it was stolen by Kazan upon his departure.

Increases Blood Fury duration by 6 seconds.

addons.name: Cracked Sakazuki
addons.description:
A cup from Kazan's wedding ceremony, it never made it through the night before being damaged.

Decreases Blood Fury activation time by 0.5 seconds.Decreases Blood Fury cooldown by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Ink Lion
addons.description:
An ink painting that once hung in the Yamaoka estate. Depicts the story of a lion eaten by mice.

Decreases Blood Fury activation time by 0.5 seconds.Decreases Blood Fury cooldown by 0.5 seconds.Decreases Blood Fury consumption when downing a Survivor by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Kanai-anzen Talisman
addons.description: A trinket given to Kazan at birth, its powers are meant to protect his family from harm.Increases movement speed of Demon Dash by 8%.

addons.name: Lion Fang
addons.description: A tooth sold from an exotic vendor, it symbolizes power and nobility.Increases Blood Fury duration by 10 seconds.

addons.name: Paper Lantern
addons.description:
Perhaps a memento of simpler times, before rage fully enveloped him.

Increases Blood Orb absorption speed by 4 m/s.

addons.name: Polished Maedate
addons.description:
A horned crest Kazan tore from his helmet after being compared to a demon.

Increases Yamaoka's Wrath passive charge rate by 50%.

addons.name: Renjiro’s Bloody Glove
addons.description:
The glove Renjiro held to his sternum following the strike dealt by his son.

All Survivors can see Blood Orbs at the same distance as you.A Survivor's aura is revealed for 2 seconds when coming into contact with a Blood Orb.

addons.name: Rotting Rope
addons.description:
Had the rope been stronger, it would have likely held Kazan. As it was, he escaped and butchered his captors.

Increases Blood Orb aura reading range by 2 meters.

addons.name: Scalped Topknot
addons.description:
The topknot of a samurai who questioned Kazan's honor. The roots cling to a thin strip of bloody skin.

Decreases time to activate Demon Dash by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Shattered Wakizashi
addons.description: The fragments of an ancestral blade, destroyed by Kazan in a fit of rage.Increases Yamaoka's Wrath passive charge rate by 100%.

addons.name: Splintered Hull
addons.description:
Fragments of a ship that carried Renjiro Yamaoka. Against all odds, the legendary samurai seemed to survive.

Increases the frequency of Blood Orbs dropped by Survivors by 33%.Survivors drop an additional Blood Orb when they vault, throw pallets, exit lockers, crouch, or fail a skill check.

addons.name: Tear Soaked Tenugui
addons.description:
The cloth that Kazan's mother cried into when he left on his pilgrimage to cleanse the samurai.

Decreases Blood Fury consumption when downing a Survivor by 4 seconds.

addons.name: Wooden Oni Mask
addons.description:
A mask that a young Kazan bought to celebrate Setsubun, its repulsively fanged mouth began haunting his nightmares.

Increases the frequency of Blood Orbs dropped by Survivors by 14%.Survivors drop an additional Blood Orb when they vault, throw pallets, exit lockers, crouch, or fail a skill check.

addons.name: Iridescent Family Crest
addons.description:
A crest that denotes its owner as being a part of the Yamaoka family.

Miss a charged attack during Blood Fury to smash the ground and create a shock wave. Any Survivors within 24 meters will scream and reveal their current location to you for 4 seconds.

addons.name: Yamaoka Sashimono
addons.description:
The banner of the Yamaoka family, Kazan felt an overwhelming pride from it.

Increases Blood Fury duration by 8 seconds.

addons.name: Friendship Charm
addons.description:
Someone's thumb has worn off the initials once carved into it.

Increases a key's charges by 1.

addons.name: Prayer Beads
addons.description:
A chain of matte beads of various sizes used in praying rituals. Can be attached to the Key.

Adds 15 seconds of use to the Key.

addons.name: Shrill Whistle
addons.description:
The high-pitched scream gives a sense of urgency to everything.

Decreases the time to channel a key by 35%.

addons.name: Gold Token
addons.description:
A gold token with a dull appearance. Both faces are smooth and void of any inscriptions. Can be attached to the Key using its jump ring to channel the key's aura reading ability.

Reveals Survivor auras when within a 48 meter range.

addons.name: Blood Amber
addons.description: A blood-red amber striped with black veins. The amber is warm to the touch.Using this key reveals the Killer to you, and you to the Killer.Reduces aura reveal time by 6 seconds.Reduces number of charges by 2.

addons.name: Milky Glass
addons.description:
This opaque piece of glass emits a dull vibrating noise. When the Key is used to unlock the Hatch, the glass token protects the Key from breaking, channeling The Fog's energy into the glass.

Do not lose the Key when unlocking the Hatch, lose this add-on instead.

addons.name: Weaved Ring
addons.description:
A mundane key ring in appearance with an unusual bluish dark sheen. The ring binds the Key to the user, preventing its loss even in the darkest of times.

Do not lose the Key on death, lose this add-on instead.

addons.name: Braided Bauble
addons.description:
Four thin but sturdy cords, all masterfully wrapped around one another.

Increases the duration of auras revealed by keys by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Unique Wedding Ring
addons.description: An engraved wedding ring that emerged from The Fog and resonates with an indescribable and incomprehensible energy. The Obsession and yourself both see each other's aura at all times.Decreases your chances to be The Killer’s Obsession.

addons.name: Blight Serum
addons.description:
A small amount of Compound Thirty-Four, the final serum The Blight worked on before his transformation. Causes extreme mutations in high doses.

You gain 1 charge of Blighted Rush that replaces your Killer power until consumed. Press the Power button to initiate a Blighted Rush, allowing you to quickly dash forward.You can not attack during a Blighted Rush.You gain 1 additional charge of Blighted Rush every time you hook a Survivor, up to a maximum of 1 charge.This add-on may have unknown effects on certain Killers.Only playable during the Haunted by Daylight Event.

addons.name: Ataxic Respiration
addons.description:
The irregular and deteriorating breath collected from the catatonic boy. Normally stable and calm, becomes incredibly agitated at The Nurse's touch.

Decreases base Blink fatigue duration by 7%.

addons.name: "Bad Man's" Last Breath
addons.description:
A powerful last breath snatched from Crotus Prenn asylum patient "the Bad Man." In the hands of The Nurse, it jolts with intensity.

Hitting a survivor with a successful Blink Attack grants the Nurse Undetectable for 25 seconds. This effect may be only triggered once every 45 seconds.

Undetectable hides the Killer's aura, Terror Radius, and Red Stain.

addons.name: Dull Bracelet
addons.description:
A worthless piece of jewelry that might have had an important significance to someone. Taken from the anxious girl's body.

Decreases maximum Blink distance by 20%.Increases Bloodpoints for Precise Blink score events by 100%.

addons.name: Heavy Panting
addons.description:
The slow and bulging breath stolen from the orderly. Dimly oscillates at The Nurse's touch.

Extends the duration of a lunge after more than one Blink by 30%.

addons.name: Jenner's Last Breath
addons.description:
A powerful last breath snatched from Crotus Prenn asylum patient Mary Jenner. In the hands of The Nurse, it trembles with intensity.

Once The Nurse has exhausted all of her Blinks, allows The Nurse to immediately Blink back to her original position by pressing the Active Ability Button.Must be triggered before The Nurse succumbs to fatigue.After returning to her original position, The Nurse will have one Blink charge ready.

addons.name: Kavanagh's Last Breath
addons.description:
A powerful last breath snatched from Crotus Prenn asylum orderly Harvey Kavanagh. In the hands of The Nurse, it wobbles with intensity.

When succumbing to fatigue, any Survivors within 8 meters of The Nurse are afflicted with the Blindness status effect for 60 seconds.

Blindness prevents Survivors from seeing auras.

addons.name: Matchbox
addons.description:
A matchbox containing an odd collection of mismatched buttons. Serves as a reminder of a horrible place.

Sets maximum number of Blink charges to 1.Increases The Nurse's base movement speed to 4.4 m/s.

addons.name: Spasmodic Breath
addons.description:
The twitchy and tremulous breath stolen from the "Bad Man." Aggressively pulses and jumps at The Nurse's touch.

Hitting a survivor with a successful Blink Attack disables the ability to Blink and increases the Nurse's base movement speed to 4.6 m/s for 60 seconds.

addons.name: Award-Winning Chili
addons.description:
A big bowl of spicy chili made famous thanks to prime meat.

Increases maximum Chainsaw Sweep duration by 0.2 seconds per charge spent.

addons.name: The Beast's Marks
addons.description:
Jagged marks cover the Chainsaw's body, punishment from the dark beast that lives in The Fog. Memories of violent reprimands fill its holder with the fear of failure.

Increases Chainsaw Sweep movement speed by 2%.Increases time required to charge the Chainsaw by 12%.

addons.name: Begrimed Chains
addons.description:
This chain is stained with a foul substance that debilitates anyone it touches.

Chainsaw hits cause Survivors to drop their items.

addons.name: Carburetor Tuning Guide
addons.description:
A crudely drawn guide to properly adjust and tune a Chainsaw carburetor.

Automatically consume all charges when triggering a Chainsaw Sweep.Increases Chainsaw Sweep duration by 0.5 seconds.Decreases Chainsaw Sweep movement speed by 2%.

addons.name: Chainsaw File
addons.description:
A file whose purpose is to hone Chainsaw chains.

Decreases tantrum duration by 0.25 seconds.

addons.name: Chili
addons.description:
A big bowl of steaming chili to keep you fresh and strong.

Increases maximum Chainsaw Sweep duration by 0.15 seconds per charge spent.

addons.name: Depth Gauge Rake
addons.description:
Tool that increases the angle of the depth gauge, making the chain eat more "wood".

Grants 1 additional Chainsaw charge.Increases time required to charge the Chainsaw by 22%.Decreases Chainsaw Sweep movement speed by 2%.

addons.name: Grisly Chain
addons.description:
A chain with unusually hefty cutter teeth that leaves victims crippled even after being healed.

Chainsaw hits inflict Mangled for 70 seconds.

Mangled increases time required to heal by 25% and lasts for a set duration or until fully healed.

addons.name: Homemade Muffler
addons.description:
A makeshift exhaust system made of black gas pipes.

Decreases tantrum duration by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Iridescent Flesh
addons.description:
A thin slice of smooth, young flesh. The veins shimmer with luminescent glow, as if life still flows within.

Hitting a Survivor with the Chainsaw replenishes its charges.Limits the maximum tantrum duration to 3 seconds.

addons.name: Knife Scratches
addons.description:
Scratches cover the Chainsaw's body, caused by a searing blade. Memories of reprimands fill its holder with the fear of failure.

Increases Chainsaw Sweep movement speed by 1.5%.Increases time required to charge the Chainsaw by 10%.

addons.name: Light Chassis
addons.description:
A light and durable Chainsaw chassis with a shorter guide bar. Makes the Chainsaw easier to handle.

While revving, see the auras of Survivors within 8 meters.

addons.name: Long Guide Bar
addons.description:
A sturdy iron replacement bar for long chains.

Increases the time the Chainsaw can be revved before triggering a tantrum by 2 seconds.

addons.name: Primer Bulb
addons.description:
Pumps more gas in the ignition system to ensure a quick and powerful start.

Decreases time required to replenish a charge by 1 second.

addons.name: Rusted Chain
addons.description:
This chain is covered with crusty and volatile rust spots that make injuries particularly difficult to heal.

Chainsaw hits inflict Broken for 90 seconds.

Broken prevents Survivors from being healed.

addons.name: Shop Lubricant
addons.description:
An oil specifically formulated for chainsaws. A special additive prevents oil throw off.

Downing a Survivor with the Chainsaw while no other Survivors are in your Terror Radius will hide the Survivor's aura for 20 seconds.

addons.name: Spark Plug
addons.description:
A clean spark plug fitted for a Chainsaw.

Decreases time required to replenish a charge by 0.5 seconds.

addons.name: Speed Limiter
addons.description:
A mechanical device that limits the amount of fuel small engines can intake at one time, forcing a constant and safe speed.

Chainsaw does not automatically trigger dying state.Get 100% more Bloodpoints for Chainsaw Hit score events.

addons.name: The Grease
addons.description:
A thick yellowish ooze, concocted by the Sawyers. Used for all-purpose lubrication around their house.

Increases the time the Chainsaw can be revved before triggering a tantrum by 3 seconds.

addons.name: Vegetable Oil
addons.description:
A rancid oil used as a poor quality lubricant.

Decreases Chainsaw cooldown by 0.3 seconds.

addons.name: Glowing Ink
addons.description:
Some of the images seemed to jump right off the page.

Increases the duration of auras revealed by maps for 2 seconds.

addons.name: Retardant Jelly
addons.description:
A slimy, translucent substance with a ghastly lavender shade. This jelly from unknown origin is highly resistant to heat.

Slows down the burning rate of the Map by 20%.

addons.name: Gnarled Compass
addons.description:
It seems to set itself to the perfect distance every time.

Increases a map's charges by 2.

addons.name: Crimson Stamp
addons.description:
Only those with absolute confidence dared to place their seal upon the map.

The Killer's Aura is revealed within 8 meters of the beam of light.Reduces beam of light duration by 10 seconds.Reduces number of charges by 2.

addons.name: Odd Stamp
addons.description:
A stamp carved out of sturdy blonde wood. The text found at the base is incomprehensible: "kw'zvre'od". Can be used with a Map.

Increases the range of the Map tracking ability by 12 meters.

addons.name: Unusual Stamp
addons.description:
A wooden stamp with a crosshatched rubber pad used to mark documents. It is unclear as to how or by whom this stamp was originally used. Can be used with a Map.

Increases the range of the Map tracking ability by 8 meters.

addons.name: Sharpened Flint
addons.description:
When sparked near the map, new sigils appeared in unexpected locations.

When using the map, all totems within range are revealed.

addons.name: Battered Tape
addons.description:
Additional pieces of parchment hung loosely from the map, hastily affixed with tape.

Increases the maximum range of a map by 8 meters.

addons.name: Yellow Wire
addons.description:
A small electrical wire. Both ends are heavily damaged like it has been forcefully torn out of its intended location. Can be tied around a Map to enhance its aura reading ability.

Unlocks the ability to track exit gates.

addons.name: Bandages
addons.description:
A pack of bandages usually found in first aid kits.

Adds 8 charges to the Med-kit.

addons.name: Gel Dressings
addons.description:
A pack of gel forming pads used to patch up heavily exudating wounds.

Adds 16 charges to the Med-kit.

addons.name: Medical Scissors
addons.description:
Scissors designed to easily cut through textiles.

Increases healing speed by 10%.

addons.name: Butterfly Tape
addons.description:
Medical quality tape used to close small wounds.

Increases healing speed by 5%.

addons.name: Sponge
addons.description:
A mundane sponge used to soak up extra blood, providing easier access to wounds.

Increases the Bonus skill check size by 20%.

addons.name: Rubber Gloves
addons.description:
Disposable medical gloves to avoid cross-contamination.

Increases the Bonus skill check size by 10%.

addons.name: Styptic Agent
addons.description:
A white powder with coagulant properties. Apply the agent to a wound to stop it from hemorrhaging.

Increases the efficiency when healing yourself with a Medkit by 15%.

addons.name: Anti-Exhaustion Syringe
addons.description:
A mysterious fluid that reinvigorates both body and mind.

Press the Secondary Action button while healing with the Med-kit to use the Anti-Exhaustion Syringe.The affected Survivor loses the Exhausted Status Effect upon use.Consumes the Med-kit on use.

Exhausted prevents Survivors from activating exhausting perks.

addons.name: Abdominal Dressing
addons.description:
A highly absorbent pad that prevents bodily fluid leakage when applied to large abdominal wounds.

Increases healing speed by 15%.

addons.name: Refined Serum
addons.description:
A refined version of the putrid serum that’s mostly safe for human consumption. Mostly.

Press the Secondary Action button while healing with the Med-kit to use the Refined Serum.Grants the Survivor 5% Haste and increases their field of view by 10 degrees for 20 seconds.Creates a blight trail behind the Survivor.Consumes the Med-kit on use.

addons.name: Gauze Roll
addons.description:
A sterile gauze used for a variety of wounds. Part of a total wound care system.

Adds 10 charges to the Med-kit.

addons.name: Needle & Thread
addons.description:
Not exactly a medical device, however it can be used to quickly and painfully close up a wound.

Increases the chances of triggering a Skill Check by 10%.Increases progression bonus for succeeding Great Skill Checks by 5%.

addons.name: Self Adherent Wrap
addons.description:
A pack of bandages that sticks to themselves without the need of clips for a faster patch-up that requires less readjustments.

Adds 8 charges to the Med-kit.Increases healing speed by 5%.

addons.name: Surgical Suture
addons.description:
A medical device used to close and hold body tissue. Even though it's very effective, the surgical suture is challenging to use.

Increases the chances of triggering a Skill Check by 15%.Increases progression bonus for succeeding Great Skill Checks by 10%.

addons.name: Bloodied Mud
addons.description:
A handful of mud with veins of deep crimson. The bloody layers empower the mud.

Decreases Phantasm Trap trigger range by 30%.

addons.name: Bloodied Water
addons.description:
Tainted water contained in a folded waterlily leaf.

Decreases Phantasm Trap trigger range by 20%.

addons.name: Bog Water
addons.description:
Murky water contained in a glass pill bottle from another time.

Decreases Phantasm Trap trigger range by 10%.

addons.name: Cracked Turtle Egg
addons.description:
A pale orange turtle egg, cracked and emptied of its content.

Increases triggered Phantasm Trap duration by 30%.

addons.name: Cypress Necklet
addons.description:
A rigid ornament worn around the neck made from dead plants adorned with crudely attached cypress bark and swamp moss.

Increases Phantasm Trap setting speed by 15%.

addons.name: Dead Fly Mud
addons.description:
A small lump of mud, black with the remains of flies. Devoured to increase stamina.

Increases teleportation range by 10%.

addons.name: Disfigured Ear
addons.description:
The cannibal village deaf boy's ear. Deformed due to several hits to the head. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

Survivors who trigger a Phantasm Trap will be deafened for 6 seconds.

addons.name: Dragonfly Wings
addons.description:
A handful of yellowish wings, dry and crisp. Devoured to increase stamina.

Increases teleportation range by 12.5%.

addons.name: Dried Cicada
addons.description:
A large swamp cicada covered in a fine layer of ash. Crispy. Devoured to increase stamina.

Increases teleportation range by 15%.

addons.name: Granma's Heart
addons.description:
The cold heart of the cannibal village elder. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

Decreases Terror Radius to 0 meters when a Survivor triggers a Phantasm Trap.Increases Mud Phantasms' Terror Radius by 16 meters.

addons.name: Half Eggshell
addons.description:
One half of a perfectly round hollow eggshell.

Increases triggered Phantasm Trap duration by 25%.

addons.name: Mint Rag
addons.description:
A small piece of cotton torn from the dress worn by Lisa Sherwood on the day she disappeared. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

The Hag can teleport to any Phantasm Trap in the level.Phantasm Trap teleport gains a cooldown of 10 seconds.

addons.name: Powdered Eggshell
addons.description:
Minuscule eggshell fragments shimmering with a pale golden hue.

Increases triggered Phantasm Trap duration by 20%.

addons.name: Pussy Willow Catkins
addons.description:
A handful of small, pristine flower clusters covered in a fine greyish fur.

Reveals the Survivor's aura for 3 seconds when they trigger a Phantasm Trap.

addons.name: Rope Necklet
addons.description:
A rigid ornament worn around the neck made from dead plants.

Increases Phantasm Trap setting speed by 10%.

addons.name: Rusty Shackles
addons.description:
Shackles once used to hold prisoners and carcasses in the cannibal village cellar. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

Triggered Phantasm Traps give no indication of being triggered to Survivors and do not spawn a Mud Phantasm.

addons.name: Scarred Hand
addons.description:
The cut up, severed hand of the cannibal village butcher. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

Mud Phantasms become solid and will block Survivors.Removes the ability to teleport to traps.Grants 300% bonus Deviousness Bloodpoints.

addons.name: Swamp Orchid Necklet
addons.description:
A rigid ornament worn around the neck made from dead plants adorned with withered orchid petals and leaves.

Increases Phantasm Trap setting speed by 20%.

addons.name: Waterlogged Shoe
addons.description:
A child's shoe, long lost in the bog's waters. The trapped life essence within unlocks tremendous potential in The Hag's power.

Survivors in the trigger zone of a triggered Phantasm Trap are Hindered by 9%.Increases movement speed by 7.5%.Removes the ability to teleport to traps.

Hindered reduces Survivor movement speed.

addons.name: Willow Wreath
addons.description:
Three frail willow branches attached to form a triangular wreath.

Reveals the Survivor's aura for 5 seconds when they trigger a Phantasm Trap.

addons.name: Mother's Glasses
addons.description:
Pair of glasses belonging to a loving mother afflicted with a chronic disease.

Survivors trigger Killer Instinct when they come within 2 meters of the husk.

addons.name: Uchiwa
addons.description:
Handheld fan with a koi motif to create a nice breeze on a hot summer day.

Instantly recharges Yamaoka's Haunting when stunned by a pallet.

addons.name: Dried Cherry Blossom
addons.description:
A crumbling, dried cherry flower. Once the symbol of mortality.

Survivors trigger Killer Instinct when they come within 3 meters of The Spirit while she is phasing.Scratch marks are no longer visible while using Yamaoka’s Haunting.

addons.name: Kintsugi Teacup
addons.description:
Cup mended and lacquered with powdered gold. Both the breakage and repair are part the cup.
